   149→                        height: dp(8)
   150→
   151→                    # ASR设置
   152→                    BoxLayout:
   153→                        size_hint_y: None
   154→                        height: dp(48)
   155→                        spacing: dp(8)
   156→                        Label:
   157→                            text: 'ASR服务:'
   158→                            size_hint_x: 0.25
   159→                            font_size: dp(14)
   160→                            color: 0.3, 0.3, 0.3, 1
   161→                            halign: 'right'
   162→                            text_size: self.size
   163→                            valign: 'center'
   164→                        Spinner:
   165→                            id: asr_spinner
   166→                            text: '离线识别(无需网络)'
   167→                            values: ['离线识别(无需网络)', 'FunASR(局域网)', '百度语音(内置)', 'Groq Whisper', 'OpenAI Whisper']
   168→                            size_hint_x: 0.75
   169→                            font_size: dp(14)
   170→                            on_text: app.on_asr_change(self.text)
   171→
   172→                    # FunASR服务器地址
   173→                    BoxLayout:
   174→                        id: funasr_box
   175→                        size_hint_y: None
   176→                        height: dp(48)
   177→                        spacing: dp(8)
   178→                        Label:
   179→                            text: '电脑IP:'
   180→                            size_hint_x: 0.25
   181→                            font_size: dp(14)
   182→                            color: 0.3, 0.3, 0.3, 1
   183→                            halign: 'right'
   184→                            text_size: self.size
   185→                            valign: 'center'
   186→                        TextInput:
   187→                            id: funasr_ip
   188→                            text: app.funasr_server
   189→                            hint_text: '如 192.168.1.100'
   190→                            size_hint_x: 0.75
   191→                            font_size: dp(14)
   192→                            multiline: False
   193→                            on_text_validate: app.save_funasr_ip(self.text)
   194→
   195→        Screen:
   196→            name: 'result'
   197→            BoxLayout:
   198→                orientation: 'vertical'
   199→                padding: dp(12)
   200→                spacing: dp(8)
   201→
   202→                # 摘要
   203→                Label:
   204→                    text: app.result_summary
   205→                    size_hint_y: None
   206→                    height: dp(80)
   207→                    font_size: dp(15)
   208→                    color: 0.8, 0.2, 0.2, 1
   209→                    text_size: self.width, None
   210→                    halign: 'center'
   211→
   212→                # 差异列表
   213→                ScrollView:
   214→                    RecycleView:
   215→                        id: diff_rv
   216→                        viewclass: 'DiffItem'
   217→                        data: app.diff_items
   218→                        RecycleBoxLayout:
   219→                            orientation: 'vertical'
   220→                            default_size: None, dp(72)
   221→                            default_size_hint: 1, None
   222→                            size_hint_y: None
   223→                            height: self.minimum_height
   224→                            spacing: dp(4)
   225→
   226→                # 返回按钮
   227→                Button:
   228→                    text: '返回首页'
   229→                    size_hint_y: None
   230→                    height: dp(48)
   231→                    font_size: dp(16)
   232→                    background_color: 0.5, 0.5, 0.5, 1
   233→                    background_normal: ''
   234→                    on_release: sm.current = 'home'
   235→
   236→
   237→<DiffItem@BoxLayout>:
   238→    orientation: 'vertical'
   239→    padding: dp(8)
   240→    spacing: dp(2)
   241→    canvas.before:
   242→        Color:
   243→            rgba: 1, 0.95, 0.95, 1
   244→        RoundedRectangle:
   245→            pos: self.pos
   246→            size: self.size
   247→            radius: [dp(6)]
   248→    Label:
   249→        text: root.diff_type if hasattr(root, 'diff_type') else ''
   250→        font_size: dp(12)
   251→        color: 0.8, 0.2, 0.2, 1
   252→        halign: 'left'
   253→        text_size: self.size
   254→        size_hint_y: 0.3
   255→    Label:
   256→        text: root.diff_detail if hasattr(root, 'diff_detail') else ''
   257→        font_size: dp(14)
   258→        color: 0.2, 0.2, 0.2, 1
   259→        halign: 'left'
   260→        text_size: self.size
   261→        size_hint_y: 0.7
   262→'''
   263→
   264→ASR_MAP = {
   265→    '离线识别(无需网络)': 'sherpa_offline',
   266→    'FunASR(局域网)': 'funasr',
   267→    '百度语音(内置)': 'baidu_builtin',
   268→    'Groq Whisper': 'groq_whisper',
   269→    'OpenAI Whisper': 'openai_whisper',
   270→}
   271→
   272→
   273→class VoiceDocApp(App):
   274→    audio_path = StringProperty('')
   275→    audio_name = StringProperty('')
   276→    doc_path = StringProperty('')
   277→    doc_name = StringProperty('')
   278→    status_text = StringProperty('就绪')
   279→    progress = NumericProperty(0)
   280→    result_summary = StringProperty('')
   281→    diff_items = ListProperty([])
   282→    asr_provider = StringProperty('sherpa_offline')
   283→    funasr_server = StringProperty('http://192.168.1.100:8765')
   284→
   285→    def build(self):
   286→        self.title = '配音文字核对宝'
   287→        self._load_config()
   288→        root = Builder.load_string(KV)
   289→        # 检查是否从微信分享启动
   290→        Clock.schedule_once(lambda dt: self._check_intent(), 1)
   291→        # 检查离线模型
   292→        Clock.schedule_once(lambda dt: self._check_model(), 2)
   293→        return root
   294→
   295→    def _config_path(self):
   296→        if platform == 'android':
   297→            from android.storage import app_storage_path
   298→            return os.path.join(app_storage_path(), 'config.json')
   299→        return os.path.join(os.path.expanduser('~'), '.voice-doc-compare', 'config_apk.json')
   300→
   301→    def _load_config(self):
   302→        self._config = {'asr_provider': 'baidu_builtin', 'asr_keys': {}}
   303→        try:
   304→            with open(self._config_path(), 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
   305→                self._config.update(json.load(f))
   306→        except:
   307→            pass
   308→        self.asr_provider = self._config.get('asr_provider', 'sherpa_offline')
   309→        self.funasr_server = self._config.get('asr_keys', {}).get('funasr', {}).get('server_url', 'http://192.168.1.100:8765')
   310→
   311→    def _save_config(self):
   312→        self._config['asr_provider'] = self.asr_provider
   313→        try:
   314→            d = os.path.dirname(self._config_path())
   315→            os.makedirs(d, exist_ok=True)
   316→            with open(self._config_path(), 'w', encoding='utf-8') as f:
   317→                json.dump(self._config, f, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2)
   318→        except:
   319→            pass
   320→
   321→    def _check_model(self):
   322→        """检查离线识别模型是否已下载"""
   323→        if self.asr_provider != 'sherpa_offline':
   324→            return
   325→        try:
   326→            from core.model_download import is_model_ready
   327→            if not is_model_ready():
   328→                self.status_text = '首次使用需下载离线模型(约80MB)，点击开始对比时自动下载'
   329→        except:
   330→            pass
   331→
   332→    def _check_intent(self):
   333→        """检查Android Share Intent"""
   334→        if platform != 'android':
   335→            return
   336→        try:
   337→            from core.wechat_import import get_android_shared_files, classify_file, import_shared_file
   338→            files = get_android_shared_files()
   339→            if not files:
   340→                return
   341→            from android.storage import app_storage_path
   342→            data_dir = os.path.join(app_storage_path(), 'imports')
   343→            for f in files:
   344→                local = import_shared_file(f, data_dir)
   345→                ftype = classify_file(local)
   346→                if ftype == 'audio':
   347→                    self.audio_path = local
   348→                    self.audio_name = os.path.basename(local)
   349→                elif ftype == 'doc':
   350→                    self.doc_path = local
   351→                    self.doc_name = os.path.basename(local)
   352→            if self.audio_path or self.doc_path:
   353→                self.status_text = '已从微信导入文件'
   354→        except Exception as e:
   355→            self.status_text = f'导入失败: {str(e)[:40]}'
   356→
   357→    def pick_audio(self):
   358→        if platform == 'android':
   359→            self._android_pick('audio')
   360→        else:
   361→            self._desktop_pick('audio')
   362→
   363→    def pick_doc(self):
   364→        if platform == 'android':
   365→            self._android_pick('doc')
   366→        else:
   367→            self._desktop_pick('doc')
   368→
   369→    def _android_pick(self, file_type):
   370→        try:
   371→            from jnius import autoclass
   372→            Intent = autoclass('android.content.Intent')
   373→            PythonActivity = autoclass('org.kivy.android.PythonActivity')
   374→            intent = Intent(Intent.ACTION_GET_CONTENT)
   375→            if file_type == 'audio':
   376→                intent.setType('audio/*')
   377→            else:
   378→                intent.setType('application/*')
   379→            intent.addCategory(Intent.CATEGORY_OPENABLE)
   380→            PythonActivity.mActivity.startActivityForResult(intent, 1 if file_type == 'audio' else 2)
   381→        except Exception as e:
   382→            self.status_text = f'文件选择失败: {str(e)[:40]}'
   383→
   384→    def _desktop_pick(self, file_type):
   385→        """桌面端文件选择（调试用）"""
   386→        try:
   387→            from plyer import filechooser
   388→            if file_type == 'audio':
   389→                paths = filechooser.open_file(title='选择录音', filters=[('音频', '*.wav', '*.mp3', '*.m4a', '*.flac')])
   390→            else:
   391→                paths = filechooser.open_file(title='选择文档', filters=[('文档', '*.docx', '*.txt')])
   392→            if paths:
   393→                p = paths[0]
   394→                if file_type == 'audio':
   395→                    self.audio_path = p
   396→                    self.audio_name = os.path.basename(p)
   397→                else:
   398→                    self.doc_path = p
   399→                    self.doc_name = os.path.basename(p)
   400→        except:
   401→            pass
   402→
   403→    def on_asr_change(self, text):
   404→        self.asr_provider = ASR_MAP.get(text, 'sherpa_offline')
   405→        self._save_config()
   406→
   407→    def save_funasr_ip(self, ip_text):
   408→        ip_text = ip_text.strip()
   409→        if not ip_text.startswith('http'):
   410→            ip_text = f'http://{ip_text}:8765'
   411→        self.funasr_server = ip_text
   412→        self._config.setdefault('asr_keys', {}).setdefault('funasr', {})['server_url'] = ip_text
   413→        self._save_config()
   414→        self.status_text = f'FunASR地址已保存: {ip_text}'
   415→
   416→    def start_compare(self):
   417→        if not self.audio_path or not self.doc_path:
   418→            self.status_text = '请先选择录音和文档'
   419→            return
   420→        self.status_text = '正在处理...'
   421→        self.progress = 0
   422→        threading.Thread(target=self._do_compare, daemon=True).start()
   423→
   424→    def _update_ui(self, **kwargs):
   425→        def _do(dt):
   426→            for k, v in kwargs.items():
   427→                setattr(self, k, v)
   428→        Clock.schedule_once(_do)
   429→
   430→    def _do_compare(self):
   431→        try:
   432→            from core.transcribe import transcribe_audio
   433→            from core.compare import compare_texts
   434→            from core.docx_util import parse_docx, parse_txt
   435→
   436→            # 步骤1: 转录
   437→            self._update_ui(status_text='正在转写录音...', progress=10)
   438→            keys = self._config.get('asr_keys', {}).get(self.asr_provider, {})
   439→            # FunASR需要server_url
   440→            if self.asr_provider == 'funasr':
   441→                keys['server_url'] = self.funasr_server
   442→            audio_text, timestamps = transcribe_audio(
   443→                self.audio_path, self.asr_provider, keys,
   444→                progress_cb=lambda m: self._update_ui(status_text=m)
   445→            )
   446→            self._update_ui(progress=50, status_text='转写完成')
   447→
   448→            # 步骤2: 解析文档
   449→            self._update_ui(status_text='正在解析文档...', progress=55)
   450→            ext = os.path.splitext(self.doc_path)[1].lower()
   451→            if ext == '.txt':
   452→                paragraphs = parse_txt(self.doc_path)
   453→            else:
   454→                paragraphs = parse_docx(self.doc_path)
   455→            doc_text = '\n'.join(paragraphs)
   456→
   457→            # 步骤3: 对比
   458→            self._update_ui(status_text='正在对比内容...', progress=70)
   459→            result = compare_texts(audio_text, doc_text, word_timestamps=timestamps)
   460→            self._update_ui(progress=95)
   461→
   462→            # 构建结果
   463→            diffs = result['diffs']
   464→            items = []
   465→            type_labels = {'mismatch': '误读', 'missing_in_audio': '漏读', 'extra_in_audio': '多读'}
   466→            for d in diffs:
   467→                dtype = type_labels.get(d['type'], d['type'])
   468→                ts = ''
   469→                if 'time_start' in d:
   470→                    m, s = divmod(int(d['time_start']), 60)
   471→                    ts = f' @{m}:{s:02d}'
   472→                if d['type'] == 'mismatch':
   473→                    detail = f'原文: {d["docText"]}  →  录音: {d["audioText"]}{ts}'
   474→                elif d['type'] == 'missing_in_audio':
   475→                    detail = f'漏读: {d["docText"]}{ts}'
   476→                else:
   477→                    detail = f'多读: {d["audioText"]}{ts}'
   478→                items.append({'diff_type': dtype, 'diff_detail': detail})
   479→
   480→            self._update_ui(
   481→                progress=100,
   482→                status_text='对比完成',
   483→                result_summary=result['summary'],
   484→                diff_items=items,
   485→            )
   486→            Clock.schedule_once(lambda dt: setattr(self.root.ids.sm, 'current', 'result'))
   487→
   488→        except Exception as e:
   489→            import traceback
   490→            traceback.print_exc()
   491→            self._update_ui(status_text=f'错误: {str(e)[:60]}', progress=0)
   492→
   493→
   494→if __name__ == '__main__':
   495→    VoiceDocApp().run()
   496→

file.content:
"""配音文字核对宝 - Android APK版 主程序"""
import os, sys, threading, json

# 设置应用数据目录
if hasattr(sys, '_MEIPASS'):
    APP_DIR = sys._MEIPASS
else:
    APP_DIR = os.path.dirname(os.path.abspath(__file__))

sys.path.insert(0, APP_DIR)

from kivy.app import App
from kivy.lang import Builder
from kivy.clock import Clock
from kivy.properties import StringProperty, NumericProperty, ListProperty
from kivy.utils import platform

KV = '''
#:import dp kivy.metrics.dp

BoxLayout:
    orientation: 'vertical'
    canvas.before:
        Color:
            rgba: 0.98, 0.97, 0.94, 1
        Rectangle:
            pos: self.pos
            size: self.size

    # 顶部标题栏
    BoxLayout:
        size_hint_y: None
        height: dp(56)
        padding: dp(16), 0
        canvas.before:
            Color:
                rgba: 0.2, 0.6, 0.86, 1
            Rectangle:
                pos: self.pos
                size: self.size
        Label:
            text: '配音文字核对宝'
            font_size: dp(20)
            bold: True
            color: 1, 1, 1, 1
            halign: 'left'
            valign: 'center'
            text_size: self.size

    # 主内容区
    ScreenManager:
        id: sm

        Screen:
            name: 'home'
            ScrollView:
                BoxLayout:
                    orientation: 'vertical'
                    size_hint_y: None
                    height: self.minimum_height
                    padding: dp(16)
                    spacing: dp(12)

                    # 微信导入提示
                    BoxLayout:
                        size_hint_y: None
                        height: dp(80)
                        padding: dp(12)
                        canvas.before:
                            Color:
                                rgba: 0.85, 0.93, 0.85, 1
                            RoundedRectangle:
                                pos: self.pos
                                size: self.size
                                radius: [dp(8)]
                        Label:
                            text: '从微信导入：在微信中长按文件 > 分享 > 选择本应用'
                            font_size: dp(14)
                            color: 0.2, 0.5, 0.2, 1
                            text_size: self.size
                            halign: 'center'
                            valign: 'center'

                    # 录音文件
                    BoxLayout:
                        size_hint_y: None
                        height: dp(56)
                        spacing: dp(8)
                        Button:
                            text: '选择录音'
                            size_hint_x: 0.3
                            font_size: dp(15)
                            background_color: 0.2, 0.6, 0.86, 1
                            background_normal: ''
                            on_release: app.pick_audio()
                        Label:
                            text: app.audio_name or '未选择'
                            font_size: dp(13)
                            color: 0.3, 0.3, 0.3, 1
                            text_size: self.size
                            halign: 'left'
                            valign: 'center'
                            shorten: True

                    # 文档文件
                    BoxLayout:
                        size_hint_y: None
                        height: dp(56)
                        spacing: dp(8)
                        Button:
                            text: '选择文档'
                            size_hint_x: 0.3
                            font_size: dp(15)
                            background_color: 0.2, 0.6, 0.86, 1
                            background_normal: ''
                            on_release: app.pick_doc()
                        Label:
                            text: app.doc_name or '未选择'
                            font_size: dp(13)
                            color: 0.3, 0.3, 0.3, 1
                            text_size: self.size
                            halign: 'left'
                            valign: 'center'
                            shorten: True

                    # 开始对比按钮
                    Button:
                        text: '开始对比'
                        size_hint_y: None
                        height: dp(56)
                        font_size: dp(18)
                        bold: True
                        background_color: 0.95, 0.3, 0.3, 1
                        background_normal: ''
                        on_release: app.start_compare()

                    # 进度
                    Label:
                        text: app.status_text
                        size_hint_y: None
                        height: dp(40)
                        font_size: dp(14)
                        color: 0.4, 0.4, 0.4, 1

                    ProgressBar:
                        value: app.progress
                        max: 100
                        size_hint_y: None
                        height: dp(8)

                    # ASR设置
                    BoxLayout:
                        size_hint_y: None
                        height: dp(48)
                        spacing: dp(8)
                        Label:
                            text: 'ASR服务:'
                            size_hint_x: 0.25
                            font_size: dp(14)
                            color: 0.3, 0.3, 0.3, 1
                            halign: 'right'
                            text_size: self.size
                            valign: 'center'
                        Spinner:
                            id: asr_spinner
                            text: '离线识别(无需网络)'
                            values: ['离线识别(无需网络)', 'FunASR(局域网)', '百度语音(内置)', 'Groq Whisper', 'OpenAI Whisper']
                            size_hint_x: 0.75
                            font_size: dp(14)
                            on_text: app.on_asr_change(self.text)

                    # FunASR服务器地址
                    BoxLayout:
                        id: funasr_box
                        size_hint_y: None
                        height: dp(48)
                        spacing: dp(8)
                        Label:
                            text: '电脑IP:'
                            size_hint_x: 0.25
                            font_size: dp(14)
                            color: 0.3, 0.3, 0.3, 1
                            halign: 'right'
                            text_size: self.size
                            valign: 'center'
                        TextInput:
                            id: funasr_ip
                            text: app.funasr_server
                            hint_text: '如 192.168.1.100'
                            size_hint_x: 0.75
                            font_size: dp(14)
                            multiline: False
                            on_text_validate: app.save_funasr_ip(self.text)

        Screen:
            name: 'result'
            BoxLayout:
                orientation: 'vertical'
                padding: dp(12)
                spacing: dp(8)

                # 摘要
                Label:
                    text: app.result_summary
                    size_hint_y: None
                    height: dp(80)
                    font_size: dp(15)
                    color: 0.8, 0.2, 0.2, 1
                    text_size: self.width, None
                    halign: 'center'

                # 差异列表
                ScrollView:
                    RecycleView:
                        id: diff_rv
                        viewclass: 'DiffItem'
                        data: app.diff_items
                        RecycleBoxLayout:
                            orientation: 'vertical'
                            default_size: None, dp(72)
                            default_size_hint: 1, None
                            size_hint_y: None
                            height: self.minimum_height
                            spacing: dp(4)

                # 返回按钮
                Button:
                    text: '返回首页'
                    size_hint_y: None
                    height: dp(48)
                    font_size: dp(16)
                    background_color: 0.5, 0.5, 0.5, 1
                    background_normal: ''
                    on_release: sm.current = 'home'


<DiffItem@BoxLayout>:
    orientation: 'vertical'
    padding: dp(8)
    spacing: dp(2)
    canvas.before:
        Color:
            rgba: 1, 0.95, 0.95, 1
        RoundedRectangle:
            pos: self.pos
            size: self.size
            radius: [dp(6)]
    Label:
        text: root.diff_type if hasattr(root, 'diff_type') else ''
        font_size: dp(12)
        color: 0.8, 0.2, 0.2, 1
        halign: 'left'
        text_size: self.size
        size_hint_y: 0.3
    Label:
        text: root.diff_detail if hasattr(root, 'diff_detail') else ''
        font_size: dp(14)
        color: 0.2, 0.2, 0.2, 1
        halign: 'left'
        text_size: self.size
        size_hint_y: 0.7
'''

ASR_MAP = {
    '离线识别(无需网络)': 'sherpa_offline',
    'FunASR(局域网)': 'funasr',
    '百度语音(内置)': 'baidu_builtin',
    'Groq Whisper': 'groq_whisper',
    'OpenAI Whisper': 'openai_whisper',
}


class VoiceDocApp(App):
    audio_path = StringProperty('')
    audio_name = StringProperty('')
    doc_path = StringProperty('')
    doc_name = StringProperty('')
    status_text = StringProperty('就绪')
    progress = NumericProperty(0)
    result_summary = StringProperty('')
    diff_items = ListProperty([])
    asr_provider = StringProperty('sherpa_offline')
    funasr_server = StringProperty('http://192.168.1.100:8765')

    def build(self):
        self.title = '配音文字核对宝'
        self._load_config()
        root = Builder.load_string(KV)
        # 检查是否从微信分享启动
        Clock.schedule_once(lambda dt: self._check_intent(), 1)
        # 检查离线模型
        Clock.schedule_once(lambda dt: self._check_model(), 2)
        return root

    def _config_path(self):
        if platform == 'android':
            from android.storage import app_storage_path
            return os.path.join(app_storage_path(), 'config.json')
        return os.path.join(os.path.expanduser('~'), '.voice-doc-compare', 'config_apk.json')

    def _load_config(self):
        self._config = {'asr_provider': 'baidu_builtin', 'asr_keys': {}}
        try:
            with open(self._config_path(), 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
                self._config.update(json.load(f))
        except:
            pass
        self.asr_provider = self._config.get('asr_provider', 'sherpa_offline')
        self.funasr_server = self._config.get('asr_keys', {}).get('funasr', {}).get('server_url', 'http://192.168.1.100:8765')

    def _save_config(self):
        self._config['asr_provider'] = self.asr_provider
        try:
            d = os.path.dirname(self._config_path())
            os.makedirs(d, exist_ok=True)
            with open(self._config_path(), 'w', encoding='utf-8') as f:
                json.dump(self._config, f, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2)
        except:
            pass

    def _check_model(self):
        """检查离线识别模型是否已下载"""
        if self.asr_provider != 'sherpa_offline':
            return
        try:
            from core.model_download import is_model_ready
            if not is_model_ready():
                self.status_text = '首次使用需下载离线模型(约80MB)，点击开始对比时自动下载'
        except:
            pass

    def _check_intent(self):
        """检查Android Share Intent"""
        if platform != 'android':
            return
        try:
            from core.wechat_import import get_android_shared_files, classify_file, import_shared_file
            files = get_android_shared_files()
            if not files:
                return
            from android.storage import app_storage_path
            data_dir = os.path.join(app_storage_path(), 'imports')
            for f in files:
                local = import_shared_file(f, data_dir)
                ftype = classify_file(local)
                if ftype == 'audio':
                    self.audio_path = local
                    self.audio_name = os.path.basename(local)
                elif ftype == 'doc':
                    self.doc_path = local
                    self.doc_name = os.path.basename(local)
            if self.audio_path or self.doc_path:
                self.status_text = '已从微信导入文件'
        except Exception as e:
            self.status_text = f'导入失败: {str(e)[:40]}'

    def pick_audio(self):
        if platform == 'android':
            self._android_pick('audio')
        else:
            self._desktop_pick('audio')

    def pick_doc(self):
        if platform == 'android':
            self._android_pick('doc')
        else:
            self._desktop_pick('doc')

    def _android_pick(self, file_type):
        try:
            from jnius import autoclass
            Intent = autoclass('android.content.Intent')
            PythonActivity = autoclass('org.kivy.android.PythonActivity')
            intent = Intent(Intent.ACTION_GET_CONTENT)
            if file_type == 'audio':
                intent.setType('audio/*')
            else:
                intent.setType('application/*')
            intent.addCategory(Intent.CATEGORY_OPENABLE)
            PythonActivity.mActivity.startActivityForResult(intent, 1 if file_type == 'audio' else 2)
        except Exception as e:
            self.status_text = f'文件选择失败: {str(e)[:40]}'

    def _desktop_pick(self, file_type):
        """桌面端文件选择（调试用）"""
        try:
            from plyer import filechooser
            if file_type == 'audio':
                paths = filechooser.open_file(title='选择录音', filters=[('音频', '*.wav', '*.mp3', '*.m4a', '*.flac')])
            else:
                paths = filechooser.open_file(title='选择文档', filters=[('文档', '*.docx', '*.txt')])
            if paths:
                p = paths[0]
                if file_type == 'audio':
                    self.audio_path = p
                    self.audio_name = os.path.basename(p)
                else:
                    self.doc_path = p
                    self.doc_name = os.path.basename(p)
        except:
            pass

    def on_asr_change(self, text):
        self.asr_provider = ASR_MAP.get(text, 'sherpa_offline')
        self._save_config()

    def save_funasr_ip(self, ip_text):
        ip_text = ip_text.strip()
        if not ip_text.startswith('http'):
            ip_text = f'http://{ip_text}:8765'
        self.funasr_server = ip_text
        self._config.setdefault('asr_keys', {}).setdefault('funasr', {})['server_url'] = ip_text
        self._save_config()
        self.status_text = f'FunASR地址已保存: {ip_text}'

    def start_compare(self):
        if not self.audio_path or not self.doc_path:
            self.status_text = '请先选择录音和文档'
            return
        self.status_text = '正在处理...'
        self.progress = 0
        threading.Thread(target=self._do_compare, daemon=True).start()

    def _update_ui(self, **kwargs):
        def _do(dt):
            for k, v in kwargs.items():
                setattr(self, k, v)
        Clock.schedule_once(_do)

    def _do_compare(self):
        try:
            from core.transcribe import transcribe_audio
            from core.compare import compare_texts
            from core.docx_util import parse_docx, parse_txt

            # 步骤1: 转录
            self._update_ui(status_text='正在转写录音...', progress=10)
            keys = self._config.get('asr_keys', {}).get(self.asr_provider, {})
            # FunASR需要server_url
            if self.asr_provider == 'funasr':
                keys['server_url'] = self.funasr_server
            audio_text, timestamps = transcribe_audio(
                self.audio_path, self.asr_provider, keys,
                progress_cb=lambda m: self._update_ui(status_text=m)
            )
            self._update_ui(progress=50, status_text='转写完成')

            # 步骤2: 解析文档
            self._update_ui(status_text='正在解析文档...', progress=55)
            ext = os.path.splitext(self.doc_path)[1].lower()
            if ext == '.txt':
                paragraphs = parse_txt(self.doc_path)
            else:
                paragraphs = parse_docx(self.doc_path)
            doc_text = '\n'.join(paragraphs)

            # 步骤3: 对比
            self._update_ui(status_text='正在对比内容...', progress=70)
            result = compare_texts(audio_text, doc_text, word_timestamps=timestamps)
            self._update_ui(progress=95)

            # 构建结果
            diffs = result['diffs']
            items = []
            type_labels = {'mismatch': '误读', 'missing_in_audio': '漏读', 'extra_in_audio': '多读'}
            for d in diffs:
                dtype = type_labels.get(d['type'], d['type'])
                ts = ''
                if 'time_start' in d:
                    m, s = divmod(int(d['time_start']), 60)
                    ts = f' @{m}:{s:02d}'
                if d['type'] == 'mismatch':
                    detail = f'原文: {d["docText"]}  →  录音: {d["audioText"]}{ts}'
                elif d['type'] == 'missing_in_audio':
                    detail = f'漏读: {d["docText"]}{ts}'
                else:
                    detail = f'多读: {d["audioText"]}{ts}'
                items.append({'diff_type': dtype, 'diff_detail': detail})

            self._update_ui(
                progress=100,
                status_text='对比完成',
                result_summary=result['summary'],
                diff_items=items,
            )
            Clock.schedule_once(lambda dt: setattr(self.root.ids.sm, 'current', 'result'))

        except Exception as e:
            import traceback
            traceback.print_exc()
            self._update_ui(status_text=f'错误: {str(e)[:60]}', progress=0)


if __name__ == '__main__':
    VoiceDocApp().run()

     7→def _convert_silk_to_wav(silk_path, output_path=None):
     8→    """将微信SILK/AMR格式音频转为WAV
     9→    微信语音消息格式：.amr 或 .silk（实际是silk v3编码）
    10→    """
    11→    if output_path is None:
    12→        output_path = silk_path.rsplit('.', 1)[0] + '.wav'
    13→
    14→    # 尝试用ffmpeg转换（支持amr和大部分格式）
    15→    try:
    16→        subprocess.run([
    17→            'ffmpeg', '-y', '-i', silk_path,
    18→            '-ac', '1', '-ar', '16000', '-acodec', 'pcm_s16le',
    19→            output_path
    20→        ], capture_output=True, timeout=30)
    21→        if os.path.exists(output_path) and os.path.getsize(output_path) > 100:
    22→            return output_path
    23→    except:
    24→        pass
    25→
    26→    # 尝试用silk-decoder（针对silk v3格式）
    27→    try:
    28→        subprocess.run(['silk_decoder', silk_path, output_path.replace('.wav', '.pcm')],
    29→                       capture_output=True, timeout=10)
    30→        pcm_path = output_path.replace('.wav', '.pcm')
    31→        if os.path.exists(pcm_path):
    32→            subprocess.run([
    33→                'ffmpeg', '-y', '-f', 's16le', '-ar', '24000', '-ac', '1',
    34→                '-i', pcm_path, output_path
    35→            ], capture_output=True, timeout=10)
    36→            os.remove(pcm_path)
    37→            if os.path.exists(output_path):
    38→                return output_path
    39→    except:
    40→        pass
    41→
    42→    return silk_path  # 返回原文件，让ASR尝试处理
    43→

    45→def preprocess_audio(filepath, progress_cb=None):
    46→    """音频预处理：格式转换 + 重采样"""
    47→    ext = os.path.splitext(filepath)[1].lower()
    48→
    49→    # 微信语音格式需要特殊处理
    50→    if ext in ('.silk', '.amr', '.slk'):
    51→        if progress_cb:
    52→            progress_cb('正在转换微信语音格式...')
    53→        wav_path = filepath.rsplit('.', 1)[0] + '_converted.wav'
    54→        return _convert_silk_to_wav(filepath, wav_path)
    55→
    56→    # 其他格式用ffmpeg统一转为16kHz WAV
    57→    if progress_cb:

    59→    out = filepath.rsplit('.', 1)[0] + '_preprocessed.wav'

    64→        ], capture_output=True, timeout=60)
    65→        if os.path.exists(out) and os.path.getsize(out) > 100:
    66→            return out
    67→    except:

    69→    return filepath

    72→def transcribe_baidu(filepath, api_key, secret_key, app_id='', progress_cb=None):
    73→    """百度语音识别API"""
    74→    if progress_cb:
    75→        progress_cb('正在获取百度Token...')
    76→
    77→    # 获取token
    78→    resp = requests.post('https://aip.baidubce.com/oauth/2.0/token',
    79→        params={'grant_type': 'client_credentials', 'client_id': api_key, 'client_secret': secret_key}, timeout=10)
    80→    token = resp.json().get('access_token')
    81→    if not token:
    82→        raise Exception('百度Token获取失败')
    83→
    84→    # 读取音频
    85→    with open(filepath, 'rb') as f:
    86→        audio_data = f.read()
    87→
    88→    if len(audio_data) > 2 * 1024 * 1024:
    89→        # 长音频分段处理
    90→        return _transcribe_baidu_chunked(filepath, token, app_id, progress_cb)
    91→
    92→    if progress_cb:
    93→        progress_cb('正在识别语音...')
    94→
    95→    payload = {
    96→        'format': 'wav', 'rate': 16000, 'channel': 1,
    97→        'cuid': app_id or 'voice_doc_compare_apk',
    98→        'token': token,
    99→        'speech': base64.b64encode(audio_data).decode(),
   100→        'len': len(audio_data),
   101→        'dev_pid': 1537
   102→    }
   103→    resp = requests.post('https://vop.baidu.com/server_api', json=payload, timeout=60)
   104→    result = resp.json()
   105→    if result.get('err_no', -1) == 0:
   106→        return ''.join(result.get('result', []))
   107→    raise Exception(f'百度识别失败[{result.get("err_no")}]: {result.get("err_msg", "未知错误")}')

   110→def _transcribe_baidu_chunked(filepath, token, app_id, progress_cb=None):
   111→    """长音频分段百度识别"""
   112→    tmpdir = tempfile.mkdtemp()
   113→    chunk_pattern = os.path.join(tmpdir, 'chunk_%03d.wav')
   114→    subprocess.run([
   115→        'ffmpeg', '-i', filepath, '-f', 'segment', '-segment_time', '55',
   116→        '-ac', '1', '-ar', '16000', '-y', chunk_pattern
   117→    ], capture_output=True, timeout=120)
   118→
   119→    chunks = sorted([os.path.join(tmpdir, f) for f in os.listdir(tmpdir) if f.startswith('chunk_')])
   120→    if not chunks:
   121→        raise Exception('音频分段失败')
   122→
   123→    results = []
   124→    for i, chunk in enumerate(chunks):
   125→        if progress_cb:
   126→            progress_cb(f'转写分块 {i+1}/{len(chunks)}...')
   127→        with open(chunk, 'rb') as f:
   128→            audio_data = f.read()
   129→        payload = {
   130→            'format': 'wav', 'rate': 16000, 'channel': 1,
   131→            'cuid': app_id or 'voice_doc_compare_apk',
   132→            'token': token,
   133→            'speech': base64.b64encode(audio_data).decode(),
   134→            'len': len(audio_data),
   135→            'dev_pid': 1537
   136→        }
   137→        try:
   138→            resp = requests.post('https://vop.baidu.com/server_api', json=payload, timeout=60)
   139→            r = resp.json()
   140→            if r.get('err_no', -1) == 0:
   141→                results.append(''.join(r.get('result', [])))
   142→        except:
   143→            pass
   144→        os.remove(chunk)
   145→    os.rmdir(tmpdir)
   146→    return ''.join(results)
   147→

   149→def transcribe_groq(filepath, api_key, progress_cb=None):
   150→    """Groq Whisper API转录"""
   151→    if progress_cb:
   152→        progress_cb('正在使用Groq Whisper转写...')
   153→    with open(filepath, 'rb') as f:
   154→        resp = requests.post('https://api.groq.com/openai/v1/audio/transcriptions',
   155→            headers={'Authorization': f'Bearer {api_key}'},
   156→            files={'file': (os.path.basename(filepath), f, 'audio/wav')},
   157→            data={'model': 'whisper-large-v3', 'language': 'zh', 'response_format': 'verbose_json',
   158→                  'timestamp_granularities': ['word']},
   159→            timeout=180)
   160→    data = resp.json()
   161→    if 'text' not in data:
   162→        raise Exception(f'Groq识别失败: {json.dumps(data, ensure_ascii=False)[:200]}')
   163→
   164→    text = data['text']
   165→    words = []
   166→    if 'words' in data:
   167→        for w in data['words']:
   168→            words.append({'word': w['word'], 'start': w['start'], 'end': w['end'], 'confidence': 0.0})
   169→    return text, words or None

   172→def transcribe_sherpa_offline(filepath, model_dir=None, progress_cb=None):
   173→    """Sherpa-ONNX 纯本地离线语音识别（适合无网络/无VPN的手机）
   174→    使用FunASR Paraformer模型的ONNX版本，50-80MB，手机可跑。
   175→    """
   176→    try:
   177→        import sherpa_onnx
   178→    except ImportError:
   179→        raise Exception('请安装 sherpa-onnx: pip install sherpa-onnx\n'
   180→                        '模型下载: https://github.com/k2-fsa/sherpa-onnx/releases')
   181→
   182→    if model_dir is None:
   183→        # 优先使用内置模型（打包在APK中）
   184→        builtin = os.path.join(os.path.dirname(os.path.dirname(os.path.abspath(__file__))), 'models', 'paraformer')
   185→        if os.path.exists(os.path.join(builtin, 'model.int8.onnx')):
   186→            model_dir = builtin
   187→        else:
   188→            from kivy.utils import platform as kv_platform
   189→            if kv_platform == 'android':
   190→                from android.storage import app_storage_path
   191→                model_dir = os.path.join(app_storage_path(), 'models', 'paraformer')
   192→            else:
   193→                model_dir = os.path.join(os.path.expanduser('~'), '.sherpa-onnx', 'paraformer')
   194→
   195→    model_path = os.path.join(model_dir, 'model.int8.onnx')
   196→    tokens_path = os.path.join(model_dir, 'tokens.txt')
   197→
   198→    if not os.path.exists(model_path):
   199→        if progress_cb:
   200→            progress_cb('首次使用，正在下载离线模型(约80MB)...')
   201→        from core.model_download import download_model
   202→        download_model(model_dir, progress_cb)
   203→
   204→    if progress_cb:
   205→        progress_cb('正在加载离线识别模型...')
   206→
   207→    recognizer = sherpa_onnx.OfflineRecognizer.from_paraformer(
   208→        paraformer=model_path,
   209→        tokens=tokens_path,
   210→        num_threads=4,
   211→        sample_rate=16000,
   212→        decoding_method='greedy_search',
   213→    )
   214→
   215→    if progress_cb:
   216→        progress_cb('正在识别语音（离线）...')
   217→
   218→    # 读取音频
   219→    import wave
   220→    with wave.open(filepath, 'rb') as wf:
   221→        assert wf.getnchannels() == 1 and wf.getsampwidth() == 2
   222→        samples = wf.readframes(wf.getnframes())
   223→
   224→    import struct
   225→    samples = struct.unpack(f'{len(samples)//2}h', samples)
   226→    samples = [s / 32768.0 for s in samples]
   227→
   228→    stream = recognizer.create_stream()
   229→    stream.accept_waveform(16000, samples)
   230→    recognizer.decode_stream(stream)
   231→
   232→    text = stream.result.text.strip()
   233→    # Sherpa-ONNX Paraformer支持时间戳
   234→    words = None
   235→    if hasattr(stream.result, 'timestamps') and stream.result.timestamps:
   236→        words = []
   237→        ts_list = stream.result.timestamps
   238→        chars = list(text.replace(' ', ''))
   239→        for i, ch in enumerate(chars):
   240→            if i < len(ts_list):
   241→                start = ts_list[i]
   242→                end = ts_list[i + 1] if i + 1 < len(ts_list) else start + 0.3
   243→                words.append({'word': ch, 'start': start, 'end': end, 'confidence': 1.0})
   244→
   245→    return text, words

   247→
   248→def _download_paraformer_model(dest_dir, progress_cb=None):
   249→    """下载Paraformer离线模型（约50MB）"""
   250→    import tarfile, io
   251→    url = 'https://github.com/k2-fsa/sherpa-onnx/releases/download/asr-models/sherpa-onnx-streaming-paraformer-bilingual-zh-en.tar.bz2'
   252→    # 国内镜像
   253→    mirror_url = 'https://hub.nuaa.cf/k2-fsa/sherpa-onnx/releases/download/asr-models/sherpa-onnx-streaming-paraformer-bilingual-zh-en.tar.bz2'
   254→
   255→    os.makedirs(dest_dir, exist_ok=True)
   256→    if progress_cb:
   257→        progress_cb('正在下载离线识别模型(约50MB)...')
   258→
   259→    for u in [mirror_url, url]:
   260→        try:
   261→            resp = requests.get(u, stream=True, timeout=30)
   262→            resp.raise_for_status()
   263→            data = io.BytesIO()
   264→            total = int(resp.headers.get('content-length', 0))
   265→            downloaded = 0
   266→            for chunk in resp.iter_content(8192):
   267→                data.write(chunk)
   268→                downloaded += len(chunk)
   269→                if progress_cb and total:
   270→                    pct = int(downloaded * 100 / total)
   271→                    progress_cb(f'下载模型: {pct}% ({downloaded//1024//1024}MB)')
   272→            data.seek(0)
   273→            with tarfile.open(fileobj=data, mode='r:bz2') as tar:
   274→                tar.extractall(dest_dir)
   275→            if progress_cb:
   276→                progress_cb('模型下载完成')
   277→            return True
   278→        except:
   279→            continue
   280→    raise Exception('模型下载失败，请手动下载')
   281→
   282→
   283→def transcribe_funasr_remote(filepath, server_url, progress_cb=None):
   284→    """调用局域网内电脑上的FunASR服务
   285→    手机和电脑在同一WiFi下，手机发送音频文件到电脑的FunASR服务。
   286→    server_url 格式: http://192.168.x.x:8765

   288→    if progress_cb:

file.content:
"""语音转录模块 - Android版，使用云端ASR API"""
import os, json, base64, tempfile, subprocess
import requests
from typing import Optional, Callable


def _convert_silk_to_wav(silk_path, output_path=None):
    """将微信SILK/AMR格式音频转为WAV
    微信语音消息格式：.amr 或 .silk（实际是silk v3编码）
    """
    if output_path is None:
        output_path = silk_path.rsplit('.', 1)[0] + '.wav'

    # 尝试用ffmpeg转换（支持amr和大部分格式）
    try:
        subprocess.run([
            'ffmpeg', '-y', '-i', silk_path,
            '-ac', '1', '-ar', '16000', '-acodec', 'pcm_s16le',
            output_path
        ], capture_output=True, timeout=30)
        if os.path.exists(output_path) and os.path.getsize(output_path) > 100:
            return output_path
    except:
        pass

    # 尝试用silk-decoder（针对silk v3格式）
    try:
        subprocess.run(['silk_decoder', silk_path, output_path.replace('.wav', '.pcm')],
                       capture_output=True, timeout=10)
        pcm_path = output_path.replace('.wav', '.pcm')
        if os.path.exists(pcm_path):
            subprocess.run([
                'ffmpeg', '-y', '-f', 's16le', '-ar', '24000', '-ac', '1',
                '-i', pcm_path, output_path
            ], capture_output=True, timeout=10)
            os.remove(pcm_path)
            if os.path.exists(output_path):
                return output_path
    except:
        pass

    return silk_path  # 返回原文件，让ASR尝试处理


def preprocess_audio(filepath, progress_cb=None):
    """音频预处理：格式转换 + 重采样"""
    ext = os.path.splitext(filepath)[1].lower()

    # 微信语音格式需要特殊处理
    if ext in ('.silk', '.amr', '.slk'):
        if progress_cb:
            progress_cb('正在转换微信语音格式...')
        wav_path = filepath.rsplit('.', 1)[0] + '_converted.wav'
        return _convert_silk_to_wav(filepath, wav_path)

    # 其他格式用ffmpeg统一转为16kHz WAV
    if progress_cb:
        progress_cb('正在预处理音频...')
    out = filepath.rsplit('.', 1)[0] + '_preprocessed.wav'
    try:
        subprocess.run([
            'ffmpeg', '-y', '-i', filepath,
            '-ac', '1', '-ar', '16000', '-acodec', 'pcm_s16le', out
        ], capture_output=True, timeout=60)
        if os.path.exists(out) and os.path.getsize(out) > 100:
            return out
    except:
        pass
    return filepath


def transcribe_baidu(filepath, api_key, secret_key, app_id='', progress_cb=None):
    """百度语音识别API"""
    if progress_cb:
        progress_cb('正在获取百度Token...')

    # 获取token
    resp = requests.post('https://aip.baidubce.com/oauth/2.0/token',
        params={'grant_type': 'client_credentials', 'client_id': api_key, 'client_secret': secret_key}, timeout=10)
    token = resp.json().get('access_token')
    if not token:
        raise Exception('百度Token获取失败')

    # 读取音频
    with open(filepath, 'rb') as f:
        audio_data = f.read()

    if len(audio_data) > 2 * 1024 * 1024:
        # 长音频分段处理
        return _transcribe_baidu_chunked(filepath, token, app_id, progress_cb)

    if progress_cb:
        progress_cb('正在识别语音...')

    payload = {
        'format': 'wav', 'rate': 16000, 'channel': 1,
        'cuid': app_id or 'voice_doc_compare_apk',
        'token': token,
        'speech': base64.b64encode(audio_data).decode(),
        'len': len(audio_data),
        'dev_pid': 1537
    }
    resp = requests.post('https://vop.baidu.com/server_api', json=payload, timeout=60)
    result = resp.json()
    if result.get('err_no', -1) == 0:
        return ''.join(result.get('result', []))
    raise Exception(f'百度识别失败[{result.get("err_no")}]: {result.get("err_msg", "未知错误")}')


def _transcribe_baidu_chunked(filepath, token, app_id, progress_cb=None):
    """长音频分段百度识别"""
    tmpdir = tempfile.mkdtemp()
    chunk_pattern = os.path.join(tmpdir, 'chunk_%03d.wav')
    subprocess.run([
        'ffmpeg', '-i', filepath, '-f', 'segment', '-segment_time', '55',
        '-ac', '1', '-ar', '16000', '-y', chunk_pattern
    ], capture_output=True, timeout=120)

    chunks = sorted([os.path.join(tmpdir, f) for f in os.listdir(tmpdir) if f.startswith('chunk_')])
    if not chunks:
        raise Exception('音频分段失败')

    results = []
    for i, chunk in enumerate(chunks):
        if progress_cb:
            progress_cb(f'转写分块 {i+1}/{len(chunks)}...')
        with open(chunk, 'rb') as f:
            audio_data = f.read()
        payload = {
            'format': 'wav', 'rate': 16000, 'channel': 1,
            'cuid': app_id or 'voice_doc_compare_apk',
            'token': token,
            'speech': base64.b64encode(audio_data).decode(),
            'len': len(audio_data),
            'dev_pid': 1537
        }
        try:
            resp = requests.post('https://vop.baidu.com/server_api', json=payload, timeout=60)
            r = resp.json()
            if r.get('err_no', -1) == 0:
                results.append(''.join(r.get('result', [])))
        except:
            pass
        os.remove(chunk)
    os.rmdir(tmpdir)
    return ''.join(results)


def transcribe_groq(filepath, api_key, progress_cb=None):
    """Groq Whisper API转录"""
    if progress_cb:
        progress_cb('正在使用Groq Whisper转写...')
    with open(filepath, 'rb') as f:
        resp = requests.post('https://api.groq.com/openai/v1/audio/transcriptions',
            headers={'Authorization': f'Bearer {api_key}'},
            files={'file': (os.path.basename(filepath), f, 'audio/wav')},
            data={'model': 'whisper-large-v3', 'language': 'zh', 'response_format': 'verbose_json',
                  'timestamp_granularities': ['word']},
            timeout=180)
    data = resp.json()
    if 'text' not in data:
        raise Exception(f'Groq识别失败: {json.dumps(data, ensure_ascii=False)[:200]}')

    text = data['text']
    words = []
    if 'words' in data:
        for w in data['words']:
            words.append({'word': w['word'], 'start': w['start'], 'end': w['end'], 'confidence': 0.0})
    return text, words or None


def transcribe_sherpa_offline(filepath, model_dir=None, progress_cb=None):
    """Sherpa-ONNX 纯本地离线语音识别（适合无网络/无VPN的手机）
    使用FunASR Paraformer模型的ONNX版本，50-80MB，手机可跑。
    """
    try:
        import sherpa_onnx
    except ImportError:
        raise Exception('请安装 sherpa-onnx: pip install sherpa-onnx\n'
                        '模型下载: https://github.com/k2-fsa/sherpa-onnx/releases')

    if model_dir is None:
        # 优先使用内置模型（打包在APK中）
        builtin = os.path.join(os.path.dirname(os.path.dirname(os.path.abspath(__file__))), 'models', 'paraformer')
        if os.path.exists(os.path.join(builtin, 'model.int8.onnx')):
            model_dir = builtin
        else:
            from kivy.utils import platform as kv_platform
            if kv_platform == 'android':
                from android.storage import app_storage_path
                model_dir = os.path.join(app_storage_path(), 'models', 'paraformer')
            else:
                model_dir = os.path.join(os.path.expanduser('~'), '.sherpa-onnx', 'paraformer')

    model_path = os.path.join(model_dir, 'model.int8.onnx')
    tokens_path = os.path.join(model_dir, 'tokens.txt')

    if not os.path.exists(model_path):
        if progress_cb:
            progress_cb('首次使用，正在下载离线模型(约80MB)...')
        from core.model_download import download_model
        download_model(model_dir, progress_cb)

    if progress_cb:
        progress_cb('正在加载离线识别模型...')

    recognizer = sherpa_onnx.OfflineRecognizer.from_paraformer(
        paraformer=model_path,
        tokens=tokens_path,
        num_threads=4,
        sample_rate=16000,
        decoding_method='greedy_search',
    )

    if progress_cb:
        progress_cb('正在识别语音（离线）...')

    # 读取音频
    import wave
    with wave.open(filepath, 'rb') as wf:
        assert wf.getnchannels() == 1 and wf.getsampwidth() == 2
        samples = wf.readframes(wf.getnframes())

    import struct
    samples = struct.unpack(f'{len(samples)//2}h', samples)
    samples = [s / 32768.0 for s in samples]

    stream = recognizer.create_stream()
    stream.accept_waveform(16000, samples)
    recognizer.decode_stream(stream)

    text = stream.result.text.strip()
    # Sherpa-ONNX Paraformer支持时间戳
    words = None
    if hasattr(stream.result, 'timestamps') and stream.result.timestamps:
        words = []
        ts_list = stream.result.timestamps
        chars = list(text.replace(' ', ''))
        for i, ch in enumerate(chars):
            if i < len(ts_list):
                start = ts_list[i]
                end = ts_list[i + 1] if i + 1 < len(ts_list) else start + 0.3
                words.append({'word': ch, 'start': start, 'end': end, 'confidence': 1.0})

    return text, words


def _download_paraformer_model(dest_dir, progress_cb=None):
    """下载Paraformer离线模型（约50MB）"""
    import tarfile, io
    url = 'https://github.com/k2-fsa/sherpa-onnx/releases/download/asr-models/sherpa-onnx-streaming-paraformer-bilingual-zh-en.tar.bz2'
    # 国内镜像
    mirror_url = 'https://hub.nuaa.cf/k2-fsa/sherpa-onnx/releases/download/asr-models/sherpa-onnx-streaming-paraformer-bilingual-zh-en.tar.bz2'

    os.makedirs(dest_dir, exist_ok=True)
    if progress_cb:
        progress_cb('正在下载离线识别模型(约50MB)...')

    for u in [mirror_url, url]:
        try:
            resp = requests.get(u, stream=True, timeout=30)
            resp.raise_for_status()
            data = io.BytesIO()
            total = int(resp.headers.get('content-length', 0))
            downloaded = 0
            for chunk in resp.iter_content(8192):
                data.write(chunk)
                downloaded += len(chunk)
                if progress_cb and total:
                    pct = int(downloaded * 100 / total)
                    progress_cb(f'下载模型: {pct}% ({downloaded//1024//1024}MB)')
            data.seek(0)
            with tarfile.open(fileobj=data, mode='r:bz2') as tar:
                tar.extractall(dest_dir)
            if progress_cb:
                progress_cb('模型下载完成')
            return True
        except:
            continue
    raise Exception('模型下载失败，请手动下载')


def transcribe_funasr_remote(filepath, server_url, progress_cb=None):
    """调用局域网内电脑上的FunASR服务
    手机和电脑在同一WiFi下，手机发送音频文件到电脑的FunASR服务。
    server_url 格式: http://192.168.x.x:8765
    """
    if progress_cb:
        progress_cb('正在连接FunASR服务...')

    # 先检查服务是否可用
    try:
        r = requests.get(f'{server_url}/health', timeout=3)
        if r.status_code != 200:
            raise Exception('FunASR服务未响应')
    except requests.exceptions.ConnectionError:
        raise Exception(f'无法连接FunASR服务 ({server_url})\n请确认：\n1. 电脑已启动FunASR服务\n2. 手机和电脑在同一WiFi\n3. IP地址正确')

    if progress_cb:
        progress_cb('正在上传音频到FunASR...')

    # 上传音频文件进行转录
    with open(filepath, 'rb') as f:
        resp = requests.post(f'{server_url}/transcribe_file',
            files={'file': (os.path.basename(filepath), f)},
            timeout=600)

    # 如果服务端不支持文件上传，回退到路径模式（同机调试用）
    if resp.status_code == 404:
        resp = requests.post(f'{server_url}/transcribe',
            json={'file_path': os.path.abspath(filepath)}, timeout=600)

    data = resp.json()
    if not data.get('success'):
        raise Exception(data.get('error', 'FunASR转写失败'))

    text = data.get('text', '')
    timestamps = data.get('timestamp')
    words = None

    if timestamps and len(timestamps) > 0:
        # 将字符级时间戳转为词级（简单按字切分）
        words = []
        for i, ch in enumerate(text):
            if ch.strip() and i < len(timestamps):
                ts = timestamps[i]
                words.append({'word': ch, 'start': ts[0] / 1000, 'end': ts[1] / 1000, 'confidence': 1.0})

    return text, words


def transcribe_audio(filepath, provider='baidu_builtin', keys=None, progress_cb=None):
    """统一转录入口"""
    keys = keys or {}
    filepath = preprocess_audio(filepath, progress_cb)

    if provider == 'sherpa_offline':
        model_dir = keys.get('model_dir')
        return transcribe_sherpa_offline(filepath, model_dir, progress_cb)

    if provider == 'funasr':
        server_url = keys.get('server_url', 'http://192.168.1.100:8765')
        return transcribe_funasr_remote(filepath, server_url, progress_cb)

    if provider in ('baidu', 'baidu_builtin'):
        api_key = keys.get('key', 'WRNGMiXLtsPvIAeh9pFhnM2W')
        secret = keys.get('secret', 'e6nlIRVT25qSuABjRmx21kRoHha2w4t4')
        app_id = keys.get('app_id', '122105243')
        text = transcribe_baidu(filepath, api_key, secret, app_id, progress_cb)
        return text, None

    elif provider == 'groq_whisper':
        return transcribe_groq(filepath, keys['key'], progress_cb)

    elif provider == 'openai_whisper':
        if progress_cb:
            progress_cb('正在使用OpenAI Whisper转写...')
        with open(filepath, 'rb') as f:
            resp = requests.post('https://api.openai.com/v1/audio/transcriptions',
                headers={'Authorization': f'Bearer {keys["key"]}'},
                files={'file': (os.path.basename(filepath), f, 'audio/wav')},
                data={'model': 'whisper-1', 'response_format': 'verbose_json',
                      'timestamp_granularities': ['word']},
                timeout=120)
        data = resp.json()
        text = data.get('text', '')
        words = [{'word': w['word'], 'start': w['start'], 'end': w['end'], 'confidence': 0.0}
                 for w in data.get('words', [])] or None
        return text, words

    raise Exception(f'不支持的ASR服务: {provider}')

1→"""Sherpa-ONNX 离线模型下载脚本
     2→
     3→在手机首次使用前，可以先在电脑上下载模型，然后传到手机。
     4→也可以在手机上直接运行此脚本下载。
     5→
     6→模型：Paraformer中英文离线识别，约80MB
     7→"""
     8→import os, sys, zipfile, requests
     9→
    10→# 使用sherpa-onnx官方提供的Paraformer中文模型
    11→MODEL_URL = 'https://github.com/k2-fsa/sherpa-onnx/releases/download/asr-models/sherpa-onnx-paraformer-zh-2023-09-14.tar.bz2'
    12→# 国内加速镜像
    13→MIRROR_URLS = [
    14→    'https://hub.nuaa.cf/k2-fsa/sherpa-onnx/releases/download/asr-models/sherpa-onnx-paraformer-zh-2023-09-14.tar.bz2',
    15→    'https://ghproxy.com/https://github.com/k2-fsa/sherpa-onnx/releases/download/asr-models/sherpa-onnx-paraformer-zh-2023-09-14.tar.bz2',
    16→    MODEL_URL,
    17→]
    18→
    19→
    20→def get_model_dir():
    21→    """获取模型存储目录"""
    22→    try:
    23→        from kivy.utils import platform
    24→        if platform == 'android':
    25→            from android.storage import app_storage_path
    26→            return os.path.join(app_storage_path(), 'models', 'paraformer')
    27→    except:
    28→        pass
    29→    return os.path.join(os.path.expanduser('~'), '.sherpa-onnx', 'paraformer')
    30→
    31→
    32→def is_model_ready(model_dir=None):
    33→    """检查模型是否已下载"""
    34→    if model_dir is None:
    35→        model_dir = get_model_dir()
    36→    return os.path.exists(os.path.join(model_dir, 'model.int8.onnx'))
    37→
    38→
    39→def download_model(dest_dir=None, progress_cb=None):
    40→    """下载Paraformer离线模型"""
    41→    import tarfile, io
    42→
    43→    if dest_dir is None:
    44→        dest_dir = get_model_dir()
    45→    os.makedirs(dest_dir, exist_ok=True)
    46→
    47→    for url in MIRROR_URLS:
    48→        try:
    49→            if progress_cb:
    50→                progress_cb(f'正在下载模型...')
    51→            print(f'尝试下载: {url}')
    52→
    53→            resp = requests.get(url, stream=True, timeout=30)
    54→            resp.raise_for_status()
    55→
    56→            total = int(resp.headers.get('content-length', 0))
    57→            data = io.BytesIO()
    58→            downloaded = 0
    59→
    60→            for chunk in resp.iter_content(8192):
    61→                data.write(chunk)
    62→                downloaded += len(chunk)
    63→                if total:
    64→                    pct = int(downloaded * 100 / total)
    65→                    mb = downloaded // 1024 // 1024
    66→                    msg = f'下载模型: {pct}% ({mb}MB)'
    67→                    if progress_cb:
    68→                        progress_cb(msg)
    69→                    if downloaded % (1024 * 1024) < 8192:
    70→                        print(msg)
    71→
    72→            data.seek(0)
    73→            if progress_cb:
    74→                progress_cb('正在解压模型...')
    75→            print('正在解压...')
    76→
    77→            with tarfile.open(fileobj=data, mode='r:bz2') as tar:
    78→                # 解压到dest_dir，去掉顶层目录
    79→                for member in tar.getmembers():
    80→                    # 去掉第一层目录名
    81→                    parts = member.name.split('/', 1)
    82→                    if len(parts) > 1:
    83→                        member.name = parts[1]
    84→                        tar.extract(member, dest_dir)
    85→
    86→            print(f'模型已下载到: {dest_dir}')
    87→            if progress_cb:
    88→                progress_cb('模型下载完成')
    89→            return True
    90→
    91→        except Exception as e:
    92→            print(f'下载失败({url}): {e}')
    93→            continue
    94→
    95→    raise Exception('所有下载源均失败，请手动下载模型')
    96→
    97→
    98→if __name__ == '__main__':
    99→    dest = sys.argv[1] if len(sys.argv) > 1 else get_model_dir()
   100→    if is_model_ready(dest):
   101→        print(f'模型已存在: {dest}')
   102→    else:
   103→        download_model(dest, progress_cb=lambda m: print(m))
   104→

Building the settings screen with ASR engine selection... Building the Kivy layout... Building the settings layout... Building the settings page layout...

I'm realizing Kivy's visibility handling is tricky—I could collapse sections by setting height to 0 and opacity to 0, or use the disabled state, but it might be simpler to just render all the cards and let the logic handle what's relevant based on the selected engine.

Now I'm mapping out the actual implementation: I need to add several StringProperty fields to track model status, model size, and API keys for Groq and OpenAI, then update the KV file to include a settings button in the title bar, simplify the home screen, and build out a comprehensive settings screen with all configuration sections visible.

For the backend, I'll need methods to check the offline model status, handle async model downloads, test the FunASR server connection, persist all settings, and respond to engine selection changes.

I'm considering whether to add support for different Paraformer variants like the Chinese-only or bilingual versions, but that feels like scope creep. I'll stick with the current model and concentrate on building out the settings UI properly.

Writing the settings page now... Writing the implementation... Writing the implementation...
