        text: root.diff_detail if hasattr(root, 'diff_detail') else ''
        font_size: dp(14)
        color: 0.2, 0.2, 0.2, 1
        halign: 'left'
        text_size: self.size
        size_hint_y: 0.7
'''


class VoiceDocApp(App):
    # --- 首页属性 ---
    audio_path = StringProperty('')
    audio_name = StringProperty('')
    doc_path = StringProperty('')
    doc_name = StringProperty('')
    status_text = StringProperty('就绪')
    progress = NumericProperty(0)
    result_summary = StringProperty('')
    diff_items = ListProperty([])

    # --- ASR 属性 ---
    asr_provider = StringProperty('sherpa_offline')
    asr_display = StringProperty('离线识别(内置)')
    asr_names = ListProperty(ASR_NAMES)
    funasr_server = StringProperty('http://192.168.1.100:8765')
    funasr_test_result = StringProperty('')
    groq_key = StringProperty('')
    openai_key = StringProperty('')

    # --- 离线模型属性 ---
    model_ready = BooleanProperty(False)
    model_status = StringProperty('检查中...')
    model_downloading = BooleanProperty(False)
    model_dl_progress = NumericProperty(0)

    # --- LLM 属性 ---
    llm_provider = StringProperty('zhipu')
    llm_display = StringProperty('智谱GLM')
    llm_names = ListProperty(LLM_NAMES)
    llm_key = StringProperty('')
    llm_model_name = StringProperty('glm-4')
    llm_test_result = StringProperty('')

    def build(self):
        self.title = '配音文字核对宝'
        self._load_config()
        root = Builder.load_string(KV)
        Clock.schedule_once(lambda dt: self._check_intent(), 1)
        Clock.schedule_once(lambda dt: self._check_model_status(), 2)
        return root

    # ==================== 配置管理 ====================

    def _config_path(self):
        if platform == 'android':
            from android.storage import app_storage_path
            return os.path.join(app_storage_path(), 'config.json')
        return os.path.join(os.path.expanduser('~'), '.voice-doc-compare', 'config_apk.json')

    def _load_config(self):
        self._config = {
            'asr_provider': 'sherpa_offline',
            'llm_provider': 'zhipu',
            'asr_keys': {},
            'llm_keys': {},
        }
        try:
            with open(self._config_path(), 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
                self._config.update(json.load(f))
        except Exception:
            pass

        # 加载 ASR
        self.asr_provider = self._config.get('asr_provider', 'sherpa_offline')
        self.asr_display = ASR_MAP_REVERSE.get(self.asr_provider, '离线识别(内置)')
        self.funasr_server = self._config.get('asr_keys', {}).get(
            'funasr', {}).get('server_url', 'http://192.168.1.100:8765')
        self.groq_key = self._config.get('asr_keys', {}).get(
            'groq_whisper', {}).get('key', '')
        self.openai_key = self._config.get('asr_keys', {}).get(
            'openai_whisper', {}).get('key', '')

        # 加载 LLM
        self.llm_provider = self._config.get('llm_provider', 'zhipu')
        self.llm_display = LLM_MAP_REVERSE.get(self.llm_provider, '智谱GLM')
        llm_info = LLM_PROVIDERS.get(self.llm_provider, {})
        self.llm_model_name = llm_info.get('default_model', '')
        self.llm_key = self._config.get('llm_keys', {}).get(
            self.llm_provider, {}).get('key', '')

    def _save_config(self):
        self._config['asr_provider'] = self.asr_provider
        self._config['llm_provider'] = self.llm_provider
        try:
            d = os.path.dirname(self._config_path())
            os.makedirs(d, exist_ok=True)
            with open(self._config_path(), 'w', encoding='utf-8') as f:
                json.dump(self._config, f, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2)
        except Exception:
            pass

    # ==================== ASR 设置 ====================

    def on_asr_change(self, text):
        new_id = ASR_MAP.get(text)
        if not new_id or new_id == self.asr_provider:
            return
        self.asr_provider = new_id
        self.asr_display = text
        self._save_config()

    def save_funasr_ip(self, ip_text):
        ip_text = ip_text.strip()
        if not ip_text:
            return
        if not ip_text.startswith('http'):
            if ':' not in ip_text:
                ip_text = f'http://{ip_text}:8765'
            else:
                ip_text = f'http://{ip_text}'
        self.funasr_server = ip_text
        self._config.setdefault('asr_keys', {}).setdefault('funasr', {})['server_url'] = ip_text
        self._save_config()

    def save_api_key(self, provider, key):
        key = key.strip()
        self._config.setdefault('asr_keys', {}).setdefault(provider, {})['key'] = key
        if provider == 'groq_whisper':
            self.groq_key = key
        elif provider == 'openai_whisper':
            self.openai_key = key
        self._save_config()

    def test_funasr(self):
        self.funasr_test_result = '正在测试...'
        threading.Thread(target=self._test_funasr_thread, daemon=True).start()

    def _test_funasr_thread(self):
        import requests
        url = self.funasr_server.rstrip('/')
        try:
            r = requests.get(f'{url}/health', timeout=5)
            if r.status_code == 200:
                self._update_ui(funasr_test_result='连接成功')
            else:
                self._update_ui(funasr_test_result=f'服务异常: HTTP {r.status_code}')
        except requests.exceptions.ConnectionError:
            self._update_ui(funasr_test_result='无法连接，请检查IP和WiFi')
        except Exception as e:
            self._update_ui(funasr_test_result=f'失败: {str(e)[:30]}')

    # ==================== 离线模型管理 ====================

    def _get_model_dir(self):
        builtin = os.path.join(APP_DIR, 'models', 'paraformer')
        if os.path.exists(os.path.join(builtin, 'model.int8.onnx')):
            return builtin
        if platform == 'android':
            from android.storage import app_storage_path
            return os.path.join(app_storage_path(), 'models', 'paraformer')
        return os.path.join(os.path.expanduser('~'), '.sherpa-onnx', 'paraformer')

    def _check_model_status(self):
        model_dir = self._get_model_dir()
        model_file = os.path.join(model_dir, 'model.int8.onnx')
        if os.path.exists(model_file):
            size_mb = os.path.getsize(model_file) // (1024 * 1024)
            self.model_ready = True
            self.model_status = f'已就绪 ({size_mb}MB)'
        else:
            self.model_ready = False
            self.model_status = '未下载 (约80MB)'

    def download_model_async(self):
        if self.model_downloading:
            return
        self.model_downloading = True
        self.model_dl_progress = 0
        self.model_status = '正在下载...'
        threading.Thread(target=self._download_model_thread, daemon=True).start()

    def _download_model_thread(self):
        try:
            from core.model_download import download_model
            model_dir = self._get_model_dir()

            def progress_cb(msg):
                # 解析百分比
                import re
                m = re.search(r'(\d+)%', msg)
                if m:
                    self._update_ui(model_dl_progress=int(m.group(1)), model_status=msg)
                else:
                    self._update_ui(model_status=msg)

            download_model(model_dir, progress_cb)
            self._update_ui(
                model_ready=True,
                model_status='下载完成',
                model_downloading=False,
                model_dl_progress=100,
            )
            Clock.schedule_once(lambda dt: self._check_model_status(), 1)
        except Exception as e:
            self._update_ui(
                model_status=f'下载失败: {str(e)[:40]}',
                model_downloading=False,
            )

    # ==================== LLM 设置 ====================

    def on_llm_change(self, text):
        new_id = LLM_MAP.get(text)
        if not new_id or new_id == self.llm_provider:
            return
        # 保存旧的key
        if self.llm_key:
            self._config.setdefault('llm_keys', {}).setdefault(
                self.llm_provider, {})['key'] = self.llm_key

        self.llm_provider = new_id
        self.llm_display = text
        llm_info = LLM_PROVIDERS.get(new_id, {})
        self.llm_model_name = llm_info.get('default_model', '')
        self.llm_key = self._config.get('llm_keys', {}).get(new_id, {}).get('key', '')
        self.llm_test_result = ''
        self._save_config()

    def save_llm_key(self, key):
        key = key.strip()
        self.llm_key = key
        self._config.setdefault('llm_keys', {}).setdefault(
            self.llm_provider, {})['key'] = key
        self._save_config()

    def test_llm(self):
        if not self.llm_key:
            self.llm_test_result = '请先输入API Key'
            return
        self.llm_test_result = '正在测试...'
        threading.Thread(target=self._test_llm_thread, daemon=True).start()

    def _test_llm_thread(self):
        import requests
        pid = self.llm_provider
        key = self.llm_key
        info = LLM_PROVIDERS.get(pid, {})
        endpoint = info.get('endpoint', '')
        model = info.get('default_model', '')

        try:
            if pid == 'claude':
                headers = {
                    'x-api-key': key,
                    'anthropic-version': '2023-06-01',
                    'Content-Type': 'application/json',
                }
                data = {
                    'model': model,
                    'max_tokens': 10,
                    'messages': [{'role': 'user', 'content': 'hi'}],
                }
            else:
                headers = {
                    'Authorization': f'Bearer {key}',
                    'Content-Type': 'application/json',
                }
                data = {
                    'model': model,
                    'max_tokens': 10,
                    'messages': [{'role': 'user', 'content': 'hi'}],
                }

            resp = requests.post(endpoint, headers=headers, json=data, timeout=15)
            if resp.status_code in (200, 201):
                self._update_ui(llm_test_result='连接成功')
            else:
                err = resp.text[:60] if resp.text else f'HTTP {resp.status_code}'
                self._update_ui(llm_test_result=f'失败: {err}')
        except Exception as e:
            self._update_ui(llm_test_result=f'失败: {str(e)[:30]}')

    def save_all_settings(self):
        """保存所有设置并返回首页"""
        # 收集当前UI状态
        try:
            funasr_input = self.root.ids.get('funasr_ip_input')
            if funasr_input:
                self.save_funasr_ip(funasr_input.text)
            groq_input = self.root.ids.get('groq_key_input')
            if groq_input:
                self.save_api_key('groq_whisper', groq_input.text)
            openai_input = self.root.ids.get('openai_key_input')
            if openai_input:
                self.save_api_key('openai_whisper', openai_input.text)
            llm_input = self.root.ids.get('llm_key_input')
            if llm_input:
                self.save_llm_key(llm_input.text)
        except Exception:
            pass

        self._save_config()
        self.root.ids.sm.current = 'home'
        self.status_text = '设置已保存'

    # ==================== 文件选择 ====================

    def pick_audio(self):
        if platform == 'android':
            self._android_pick('audio')
        else:
            self._desktop_pick('audio')

    def pick_doc(self):
        if platform == 'android':
            self._android_pick('doc')
        else:
            self._desktop_pick('doc')

    def _android_pick(self, file_type):
        try:
            from jnius import autoclass
            Intent = autoclass('android.content.Intent')
            PythonActivity = autoclass('org.kivy.android.PythonActivity')
            intent = Intent(Intent.ACTION_GET_CONTENT)
            if file_type == 'audio':
                intent.setType('audio/*')
            else:
                intent.setType('application/*')
            intent.addCategory(Intent.CATEGORY_OPENABLE)
            PythonActivity.mActivity.startActivityForResult(intent, 1 if file_type == 'audio' else 2)
        except Exception as e:
            self.status_text = f'文件选择失败: {str(e)[:40]}'

    def _desktop_pick(self, file_type):
        try:
            from plyer import filechooser
            if file_type == 'audio':
                paths = filechooser.open_file(title='选择录音',
                    filters=[('音频', '*.wav', '*.mp3', '*.m4a', '*.flac')])
            else:
                paths = filechooser.open_file(title='选择文档',
                    filters=[('文档', '*.docx', '*.txt')])
            if paths:
                p = paths[0]
                if file_type == 'audio':
                    self.audio_path = p
                    self.audio_name = os.path.basename(p)
                else:
                    self.doc_path = p
                    self.doc_name = os.path.basename(p)
        except Exception:
            pass

    # ==================== 微信Intent ====================

    def _check_intent(self):
        if platform != 'android':
            return
        try:
            from core.wechat_import import get_android_shared_files, classify_file, import_shared_file
            files = get_android_shared_files()
            if not files:
                return
            from android.storage import app_storage_path
            data_dir = os.path.join(app_storage_path(), 'imports')
            for f in files:
                local = import_shared_file(f, data_dir)
                ftype = classify_file(local)
                if ftype == 'audio':
                    self.audio_path = local
                    self.audio_name = os.path.basename(local)
                elif ftype == 'doc':
                    self.doc_path = local
                    self.doc_name = os.path.basename(local)
            if self.audio_path or self.doc_path:
                self.status_text = '已从微信导入文件'
        except Exception as e:
            self.status_text = f'导入失败: {str(e)[:40]}'

    # ==================== 对比流程 ====================

    def start_compare(self):
        if not self.audio_path or not self.doc_path:
            self.status_text = '请先选择录音和文档'
            return
        self.status_text = '正在处理...'
        self.progress = 0
        threading.Thread(target=self._do_compare, daemon=True).start()

    def _update_ui(self, **kwargs):
        def _do(dt):
            for k, v in kwargs.items():
                setattr(self, k, v)
        Clock.schedule_once(_do)

    def _do_compare(self):
        try:
            from core.transcribe import transcribe_audio
            from core.compare import compare_texts
            from core.docx_util import parse_docx, parse_txt

            # 步骤1: 转录
            self._update_ui(status_text='正在转写录音...', progress=10)
            keys = self._config.get('asr_keys', {}).get(self.asr_provider, {})
            if self.asr_provider == 'funasr':
                keys['server_url'] = self.funasr_server
            audio_text, timestamps = transcribe_audio(
                self.audio_path, self.asr_provider, keys,
                progress_cb=lambda m: self._update_ui(status_text=m)
            )
            self._update_ui(progress=50, status_text='转写完成')

            # 步骤2: 解析文档
            self._update_ui(status_text='正在解析文档...', progress=55)
            ext = os.path.splitext(self.doc_path)[1].lower()
            if ext == '.txt':
                paragraphs = parse_txt(self.doc_path)
            else:
                paragraphs = parse_docx(self.doc_path)
            doc_text = '\n'.join(paragraphs)

            # 步骤3: 对比
            self._update_ui(status_text='正在对比内容...', progress=70)
            result = compare_texts(audio_text, doc_text, word_timestamps=timestamps)
            self._update_ui(progress=95)

            # 构建结果
            diffs = result['diffs']
            items = []
            type_labels = {'mismatch': '误读', 'missing_in_audio': '漏读', 'extra_in_audio': '多读'}
            for d in diffs:
                dtype = type_labels.get(d['type'], d['type'])
                ts = ''
                if 'time_start' in d:
                    m, s = divmod(int(d['time_start']), 60)
                    ts = f' @{m}:{s:02d}'
                if d['type'] == 'mismatch':
                    detail = f'原文: {d["docText"]}  ->  录音: {d["audioText"]}{ts}'
                elif d['type'] == 'missing_in_audio':
                    detail = f'漏读: {d["docText"]}{ts}'
                else:
                    detail = f'多读: {d["audioText"]}{ts}'
                items.append({'diff_type': dtype, 'diff_detail': detail})

            self._update_ui(
                progress=100,
                status_text='对比完成',
                result_summary=result['summary'],
                diff_items=items,
            )
            Clock.schedule_once(lambda dt: setattr(self.root.ids.sm, 'current', 'result'))

        except Exception as e:
            import traceback
            traceback.print_exc()
            self._update_ui(status_text=f'错误: {str(e)[:60]}', progress=0)


if __name__ == '__main__':
    VoiceDocApp().run()

"""配音文字核对宝 - Android APK版 主程序"""
import os, sys, threading, json

# 设置应用数据目录
if hasattr(sys, '_MEIPASS'):
    APP_DIR = sys._MEIPASS
else:
    APP_DIR = os.path.dirname(os.path.abspath(__file__))

sys.path.insert(0, APP_DIR)

from kivy.app import App
from kivy.lang import Builder
from kivy.clock import Clock
from kivy.properties import StringProperty, NumericProperty, ListProperty
from kivy.utils import platform

KV = '''
#:import dp kivy.metrics.dp

BoxLayout:
    orientation: 'vertical'
    canvas.before:

            pos: self.pos
            size: self.size

    # 顶部标题栏
    BoxLayout:
        size_hint_y: None
        height: dp(56)
        padding: dp(16), 0
        canvas.before:
            Color:
                rgba: 0.2, 0.6, 0.86, 1
            Rectangle:
                pos: self.pos
                size: self.size
        Label:
            text: '配音文字核对宝'
            font_size: dp(20)
            bold: True
            color: 1, 1, 1, 1
            halign: 'left'
            valign: 'center'
            text_size: self.size

    # 主内容区
    ScreenManager:
        id: sm

        Screen:
            name: 'home'
            ScrollView:
                BoxLayout:
                    orientation: 'vertical'
                    size_hint_y: None
                    height: self.minimum_height
                    padding: dp(16)
                    spacing: dp(12)

                    # 微信导入提示
                    BoxLayout:
                        size_hint_y: None
                        height: dp(80)
                        padding: dp(12)
                        canvas.before:
                            Color:
                                rgba: 0.85, 0.93, 0.85, 1
                            RoundedRectangle:
                                pos: self.pos
                                size: self.size
                                radius: [dp(8)]
                        Label:
                            text: '从微信导入：在微信中长按文件 > 分享 > 选择本应用'
                            font_size: dp(14)
                            color: 0.2, 0.5, 0.2, 1
                            text_size: self.size
                            halign: 'center'
                            valign: 'center'

                    # 录音文件
                    BoxLayout:
                        size_hint_y: None
                        height: dp(56)
                        spacing: dp(8)
                        Button:
                            text: '选择录音'
                            size_hint_x: 0.3
                            font_size: dp(15)
                            background_color: 0.2, 0.6, 0.86, 1
                            background_normal: ''
                            on_release: app.pick_audio()
                        Label:
                            text: app.audio_name or '未选择'
                            font_size: dp(13)
                            color: 0.3, 0.3, 0.3, 1

                            halign: 'left'
                            valign: 'center'
                            shorten: True

                    # 文档文件
                    BoxLayout:
                        size_hint_y: None
                        height: dp(56)
                        spacing: dp(8)
                        Button:
                            text: '选择文档'
                            size_hint_x: 0.3
                            font_size: dp(15)
                            background_color: 0.2, 0.6, 0.86, 1
                            background_normal: ''
                            on_release: app.pick_doc()
                        Label:
                            text: app.doc_name or '未选择'
                            font_size: dp(13)
                            color: 0.3, 0.3, 0.3, 1
                            text_size: self.size
                            halign: 'left'
                            valign: 'center'
                            shorten: True

                    # 开始对比按钮
                    Button:
                        text: '开始对比'
                        size_hint_y: None
                        height: dp(56)
                        font_size: dp(18)
                        bold: True
                        background_color: 0.95, 0.3, 0.3, 1
                        background_normal: ''
                        on_release: app.start_compare()

                    # 进度
                    Label:
                        text: app.status_text

                        height: dp(40)

                    ProgressBar:
                        value: app.progress
                        max: 100
                        size_hint_y: None

                    # ASR设置
                    BoxLayout:
                        size_hint_y: None

                        Spinner:

                    # FunASR服务器地址

        Screen:

                # 差异列表
                ScrollView:

                            size_hint_y: None

                            spacing: dp(4)

                # 返回按钮
                Button:
                    text: '返回首页'
                    size_hint_y: None

                    font_size: dp(16)
                    background_color: 0.5, 0.5, 0.5, 1
                    background_normal: ''
                    on_release: sm.current = 'home'

ASR_MAP = {
    '离线识别(无需网络)': 'sherpa_offline',
    'FunASR(局域网)': 'funasr',
    '百度语音(内置)': 'baidu_builtin',
    'Groq Whisper': 'groq_whisper',
    'OpenAI Whisper': 'openai_whisper',
}


class VoiceDocApp(App):
    audio_path = StringProperty('')
    audio_name = StringProperty('')
    doc_path = StringProperty('')
    doc_name = StringProperty('')
    status_text = StringProperty('就绪')
    progress = NumericProperty(0)
    result_summary = StringProperty('')
    diff_items = ListProperty([])
    asr_provider = StringProperty('sherpa_offline')
    funasr_server = StringProperty('http://192.168.1.100:8765')

    def build(self):
        self.title = '配音文字核对宝'
        self._load_config()
        root = Builder.load_string(KV)
        # 检查是否从微信分享启动
        Clock.schedule_once(lambda dt: self._check_intent(), 1)
        # 检查离线模型
        Clock.schedule_once(lambda dt: self._check_model(), 2)
        return root

    def _config_path(self):
        if platform == 'android':
            from android.storage import app_storage_path
            return os.path.join(app_storage_path(), 'config.json')
        return os.path.join(os.path.expanduser('~'), '.voice-doc-compare', 'config_apk.json')

    def _load_config(self):
        self._config = {'asr_provider': 'baidu_builtin', 'asr_keys': {}}
        try:
            with open(self._config_path(), 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
                self._config.update(json.load(f))
        except:
            pass
        self.asr_provider = self._config.get('asr_provider', 'sherpa_offline')
        self.funasr_server = self._config.get('asr_keys', {}).get('funasr', {}).get('server_url', 'http://192.168.1.100:8765')

    def _save_config(self):
        self._config['asr_provider'] = self.asr_provider
        try:
            d = os.path.dirname(self._config_path())
            os.makedirs(d, exist_ok=True)
            with open(self._config_path(), 'w', encoding='utf-8') as f:
                json.dump(self._config, f, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2)
        except:
            pass

    def _check_model(self):
        """检查离线识别模型是否已下载"""
        if self.asr_provider != 'sherpa_offline':
            return
        try:
            from core.model_download import is_model_ready
            if not is_model_ready():
                self.status_text = '首次使用需下载离线模型(约80MB)，点击开始对比时自动下载'
        except:
            pass

    def _check_intent(self):
        """检查Android Share Intent"""
        if platform != 'android':
            return
        try:
            from core.wechat_import import get_android_shared_files, classify_file, import_shared_file
            files = get_android_shared_files()
            if not files:
                return
            from android.storage import app_storage_path
            data_dir = os.path.join(app_storage_path(), 'imports')
            for f in files:
                local = import_shared_file(f, data_dir)
                ftype = classify_file(local)
                if ftype == 'audio':
                    self.audio_path = local
                    self.audio_name = os.path.basename(local)
                elif ftype == 'doc':
                    self.doc_path = local
                    self.doc_name = os.path.basename(local)
            if self.audio_path or self.doc_path:
                self.status_text = '已从微信导入文件'
        except Exception as e:
            self.status_text = f'导入失败: {str(e)[:40]}'

    def pick_audio(self):
        if platform == 'android':
            self._android_pick('audio')
        else:
            self._desktop_pick('audio')

    def pick_doc(self):
        if platform == 'android':
            self._android_pick('doc')
        else:
            self._desktop_pick('doc')

    def _android_pick(self, file_type):
        try:
            from jnius import autoclass
            Intent = autoclass('android.content.Intent')
            PythonActivity = autoclass('org.kivy.android.PythonActivity')
            intent = Intent(Intent.ACTION_GET_CONTENT)
            if file_type == 'audio':
                intent.setType('audio/*')
            else:
                intent.setType('application/*')
            intent.addCategory(Intent.CATEGORY_OPENABLE)
            PythonActivity.mActivity.startActivityForResult(intent, 1 if file_type == 'audio' else 2)
        except Exception as e:
            self.status_text = f'文件选择失败: {str(e)[:40]}'

    def _desktop_pick(self, file_type):
        """桌面端文件选择（调试用）"""
        try:
            from plyer import filechooser
            if file_type == 'audio':
                paths = filechooser.open_file(title='选择录音', filters=[('音频', '*.wav', '*.mp3', '*.m4a', '*.flac')])
            else:
                paths = filechooser.open_file(title='选择文档', filters=[('文档', '*.docx', '*.txt')])
            if paths:
                p = paths[0]
                if file_type == 'audio':
                    self.audio_path = p
                    self.audio_name = os.path.basename(p)
                else:
                    self.doc_path = p
                    self.doc_name = os.path.basename(p)
        except:
            pass

    def on_asr_change(self, text):
        self.asr_provider = ASR_MAP.get(text, 'sherpa_offline')
        self._save_config()

    def save_funasr_ip(self, ip_text):
        ip_text = ip_text.strip()
        if not ip_text.startswith('http'):
            ip_text = f'http://{ip_text}:8765'
        self.funasr_server = ip_text
        self._config.setdefault('asr_keys', {}).setdefault('funasr', {})['server_url'] = ip_text
        self._save_config()
        self.status_text = f'FunASR地址已保存: {ip_text}'

    def start_compare(self):
        if not self.audio_path or not self.doc_path:
            self.status_text = '请先选择录音和文档'
            return
        self.status_text = '正在处理...'
        self.progress = 0
        threading.Thread(target=self._do_compare, daemon=True).start()

    def _update_ui(self, **kwargs):
        def _do(dt):
            for k, v in kwargs.items():
                setattr(self, k, v)
        Clock.schedule_once(_do)

    def _do_compare(self):
        try:
            from core.transcribe import transcribe_audio
            from core.compare import compare_texts
            from core.docx_util import parse_docx, parse_txt

            # 步骤1: 转录
            self._update_ui(status_text='正在转写录音...', progress=10)
            keys = self._config.get('asr_keys', {}).get(self.asr_provider, {})
            # FunASR需要server_url
            if self.asr_provider == 'funasr':
                keys['server_url'] = self.funasr_server
            audio_text, timestamps = transcribe_audio(
                self.audio_path, self.asr_provider, keys,
                progress_cb=lambda m: self._update_ui(status_text=m)
            )
            self._update_ui(progress=50, status_text='转写完成')

            # 步骤2: 解析文档
            self._update_ui(status_text='正在解析文档...', progress=55)
            ext = os.path.splitext(self.doc_path)[1].lower()
            if ext == '.txt':
                paragraphs = parse_txt(self.doc_path)
            else:
                paragraphs = parse_docx(self.doc_path)
            doc_text = '\n'.join(paragraphs)

            # 步骤3: 对比
            self._update_ui(status_text='正在对比内容...', progress=70)
            result = compare_texts(audio_text, doc_text, word_timestamps=timestamps)
            self._update_ui(progress=95)

            # 构建结果
            diffs = result['diffs']
            items = []
            type_labels = {'mismatch': '误读', 'missing_in_audio': '漏读', 'extra_in_audio': '多读'}
            for d in diffs:
                dtype = type_labels.get(d['type'], d['type'])
                ts = ''
                if 'time_start' in d:
                    m, s = divmod(int(d['time_start']), 60)
                    ts = f' @{m}:{s:02d}'
                if d['type'] == 'mismatch':
                    detail = f'原文: {d["docText"]}  →  录音: {d["audioText"]}{ts}'
                elif d['type'] == 'missing_in_audio':
                    detail = f'漏读: {d["docText"]}{ts}'
                else:
                    detail = f'多读: {d["audioText"]}{ts}'
                items.append({'diff_type': dtype, 'diff_detail': detail})

            self._update_ui(
                progress=100,
                status_text='对比完成',
                result_summary=result['summary'],
                diff_items=items,
            )
            Clock.schedule_once(lambda dt: setattr(self.root.ids.sm, 'current', 'result'))

        except Exception as e:
            import traceback
            traceback.print_exc()
            self._update_ui(status_text=f'错误: {str(e)[:60]}', progress=0)


if __name__ == '__main__':
    VoiceDocApp().run()

content.text:
完成。以下是改动总结：

## 变更内容

### 新增 `app/core/config.py` (129行)
- **5个ASR引擎**定义：离线识别(Sherpa-ONNX)、FunASR(局域网)、百度语音(内置)、Groq Whisper、OpenAI Whisper
- **16个LLM大模型**定义（从桌面版移植）：
  - 国内8家：智谱GLM、DeepSeek、通义千问、Kimi、百川、MiniMax、阶跃星辰、豆包
  - 国际8家：OpenAI、Claude、Gemini、Groq、Mistral、Cohere、Perplexity、Together AI
- 每个LLM包含：名称、endpoint、default_model
- 自动生成 Spinner 显示名映射表

### 重写 `app/main.py` (495行 -> 1103行)
新增三屏布局：**首页** / **设置页** / **结果页**

**设置页包含4张卡片：**

| 卡片 | 功能 |
|------|------|
| 离线识别模型 | 检测模型状态(大小)、下载/重新下载按钮、下载进度条 |
| FunASR局域网 | 服务器地址输入、**测试连接**按钮、实时状态反馈 |
| 云端API密钥 | Groq Key / OpenAI Key 密码输入框、百度内置免配 |
| 大模型配置 | 16家LLM服务商Spinner、API Key输入、模型名显示、**测试连接** |

**新增功能：**
- 标题栏动态按钮：首页显示"配置"，其他页显示"返回"
- 离线模型管理：自动检测模型文件、后台下载+进度回调
- FunASR连接测试：后台HTTP探活，显示成功/失败
- LLM连接测试：发真实API请求验证key有效性（Claude用特殊header）
- 切换LLM时自动保存旧key、加载新key
- "保存并返回"一键收集所有输入框内容写入config

title = 配音文字核对宝

source.dir = ./app
source.include_exts = py,png,jpg,kv,atlas,json,onnx,txt

requirements = python3,kivy,requests,pyjnius,android,pillow,sherpa-onnx

android.permissions = INTERNET,READ_EXTERNAL_STORAGE,WRITE_EXTERNAL_STORAGE,RECORD_AUDIO

android.minapi = 24
android.ndk = 25b
android.accept_sdk_license = True
android.arch = arm64-v8a

# Share Intent: 接收微信分享的音频和文档
android.manifest.intent_filters = intent_filters.xml

# 全屏
fullscreen = 0
orientation = portrait

# 图标

# 日志
log_level = 2

[buildozer]
log_level = 2
warn_on_root = 1

content.content:
1→"""构建APK的说明和辅助脚本
     2→
     3→构建环境要求（Linux/WSL）：
     4→    sudo apt install python3-pip openjdk-17-jdk autoconf automake libtool
     5→    pip install buildozer cython kivy
     6→
     7→构建步骤：
     8→    1. 在Linux/WSL中进入项目目录
     9→    2. 运行: buildozer android debug
    10→    3. APK输出到: bin/voicedoccompare-1.0.0-arm64-v8a-debug.apk
    11→
    12→也可以用GitHub Actions自动构建（见 .github/workflows/build.yml）
    13→"""
    14→import os
    15→import sys
    16→import subprocess
    17→
    18→
    19→def check_env():
    20→    """检查构建环境"""
    21→    checks = {
    22→        'Python': sys.version,
    23→        'buildozer': None,
    24→        'java': None,
    25→    }
    26→    try:
    27→        r = subprocess.run(['buildozer', '--version'], capture_output=True, text=True)
    28→        checks['buildozer'] = r.stdout.strip() or r.stderr.strip()
    29→    except FileNotFoundError:
    30→        checks['buildozer'] = 'NOT INSTALLED - pip install buildozer'
    31→
    32→    try:
    33→        r = subprocess.run(['java', '-version'], capture_output=True, text=True)
    34→        checks['java'] = r.stderr.strip().split('\n')[0]
    35→    except FileNotFoundError:
    36→        checks['java'] = 'NOT INSTALLED - apt install openjdk-17-jdk'
    37→
    38→    for k, v in checks.items():
    39→        status = 'OK' if v and 'NOT INSTALLED' not in str(v) else 'MISSING'
    40→        print(f'  [{status}] {k}: {v}')
    41→
    42→    return all('NOT INSTALLED' not in str(v) for v in checks.values())
    43→
    44→
    45→def build_debug():
    46→    """构建debug APK"""
    47→    if not check_env():
    48→        print('\n环境检查未通过，请安装缺失的依赖')
    49→        return
    50→    print('\n开始构建APK...')
    51→    subprocess.run(['buildozer', 'android', 'debug'], cwd=os.path.dirname(__file__))
    52→
    53→
    54→if __name__ == '__main__':
    55→    if len(sys.argv) > 1 and sys.argv[1] == 'check':
    56→        check_env()
    57→    else:
    58→        build_debug()
    59→

content.content:
1→"""Android端Python引擎 - 被Java通过Chaquopy调用"""
     2→import os, re
     3→from difflib import SequenceMatcher
     4→
     5→
     6→# ===== 文档解析 =====
     7→def parse_docx(filepath):
     8→    ext = os.path.splitext(filepath)[1].lower()
     9→    if ext == '.txt':
    10→        with open(filepath, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
    11→            return [l.strip() for l in f if l.strip()]
    12→    # docx用zipfile解析（不依赖python-docx）
    13→    import zipfile
    14→    from xml.etree import ElementTree
    15→    ns = '{http://schemas.openxmlformats.org/wordprocessingml/2006/main}'
    16→    paragraphs = []
    17→    with zipfile.ZipFile(filepath) as z:
    18→        with z.open('word/document.xml') as f:
    19→            tree = ElementTree.parse(f)
    20→    for p in tree.iter(f'{ns}p'):
    21→        texts = [t.text for t in p.iter(f'{ns}t') if t.text]
    22→        line = ''.join(texts).strip()
    23→        if line:
    24→            paragraphs.append(line)
    25→    return paragraphs
    26→
    27→
    28→# ===== 文本规范化 =====
    29→_RE_PUNCT = re.compile(r'[，。！？；：、\u201c\u201d\u2018\u2019（）【】《》…—·\s,.!?;:\'"()\[\]{}\-]')
    30→FILLER_WORDS = {'嗯', '呃', '啊', '哦', '呢', '吧', '嘛', '哈', '噢', '诶', '那个', '就是', '然后'}
    31→CN_NUM = {'0':'零','1':'一','2':'二','3':'三','4':'四','5':'五','6':'六','7':'七','8':'八','9':'九'}
    32→
    33→def _norm(text):
    34→    return _RE_PUNCT.sub('', text)
    35→
    36→def _segment(text):
    37→    return [c for c in text if c.strip()]
    38→
    39→def _num_reading(text):
    40→    result = re.sub(r'(\d{4})年', lambda m: ''.join(CN_NUM.get(d,d) for d in m.group(1))+'年', text)
    41→    result = re.sub(r'(\d+)%', lambda m: '百分之'+''.join(CN_NUM.get(d,d) for d in m.group(1)), result)
    42→    return re.sub(r'(\d+)', lambda m: ''.join(CN_NUM.get(d,d) for d in m.group(1)), result)
    43→
    44→def _same_pinyin(a, b):
    45→    a_c, b_c = _norm(a), _norm(b)
    46→    if not a_c or not b_c:
    47→        return False
    48→    if a_c == b_c:
    49→        return True
    50→    if _num_reading(a_c) == _num_reading(b_c):
    51→        return True
    52→    try:
    53→        from pypinyin import pinyin, Style
    54→        return pinyin(a_c, style=Style.TONE3) == pinyin(b_c, style=Style.TONE3)
    55→    except:
    56→        return False
    57→
    58→
    59→# ===== 对比算法 =====
    60→def compare_texts(audio_text, doc_text):
    61→    doc_paragraphs = [p.strip() for p in doc_text.split('\n') if p.strip()]
    62→    audio_norm = _norm(audio_text)
    63→    doc_norm = _norm(doc_text)
    64→    audio_words = _segment(audio_norm)
    65→    doc_words = _segment(doc_norm)
    66→
    67→    matcher = SequenceMatcher(None, doc_words, audio_words)
    68→    diffs = []
    69→
    70→    for tag, i1, i2, j1, j2 in matcher.get_opcodes():
    71→        if tag == 'equal':
    72→            continue
    73→        doc_frag = ''.join(doc_words[i1:i2])
    74→        audio_frag = ''.join(audio_words[j1:j2])
    75→
    76→        if tag == 'insert' and audio_frag in FILLER_WORDS:
    77→            continue
    78→        if tag == 'delete' and doc_frag in FILLER_WORDS:
    79→            continue
    80→        if tag == 'replace' and _same_pinyin(doc_frag, audio_frag):
    81→            continue
    82→        if all(_RE_PUNCT.match(c) for c in doc_frag if c.strip()) and all(_RE_PUNCT.match(c) for c in audio_frag if c.strip()):
    83→            continue
    84→
    85→        dtype = '误读' if tag == 'replace' else ('漏读' if tag == 'delete' else '多读')
    86→        if tag == 'replace':
    87→            diffs.append(f'[{dtype}] 原文: {doc_frag} → 录音: {audio_frag}')
    88→        elif tag == 'delete':
    89→            diffs.append(f'[{dtype}] {doc_frag}')
    90→        else:
    91→            diffs.append(f'[{dtype}] {audio_frag}')
    92→
    93→    total = max(len(doc_norm), 1)
    94→    diff_chars = sum(len(d) for d in diffs)
    95→    n_mis = sum(1 for d in diffs if d.startswith('[误读'))
    96→    n_miss = sum(1 for d in diffs if d.startswith('[漏读'))
    97→    n_extra = sum(1 for d in diffs if d.startswith('[多读'))
    98→    accuracy = max(0, (1 - len(diffs) * 3 / total) * 100)
    99→
   100→    summary = f'共{len(diffs)}处差异：{n_mis}处误读，{n_miss}处漏读，{n_extra}处多读\n准确率约 {accuracy:.1f}%'
   101→    return summary, diffs
   102→
   103→
   104→# ===== 语音转录 =====
   105→def transcribe_sherpa(audio_path, model_dir):
   106→    import sherpa_onnx, wave, struct
   107→    model_path = os.path.join(model_dir, 'model.int8.onnx')
   108→    tokens_path = os.path.join(model_dir, 'tokens.txt')
   109→
   110→    recognizer = sherpa_onnx.OfflineRecognizer.from_paraformer(
   111→        paraformer=model_path, tokens=tokens_path,
   112→        num_threads=4, sample_rate=16000, decoding_method='greedy_search')
   113→
   114→    with wave.open(audio_path, 'rb') as wf:
   115→        samples = wf.readframes(wf.getnframes())
   116→    samples = struct.unpack(f'{len(samples)//2}h', samples)
   117→    samples = [s / 32768.0 for s in samples]
   118→
   119→    stream = recognizer.create_stream()
   120→    stream.accept_waveform(16000, samples)
   121→    recognizer.decode_stream(stream)
   122→    return stream.result.text.strip()
   123→
   124→
   125→def preprocess_audio(filepath, cache_dir):
   126→    """简单的音频预处理 - 转为16kHz WAV"""
   127→    out = os.path.join(cache_dir, 'preprocessed.wav')
   128→    try:
   129→        import subprocess
   130→        subprocess.run(['ffmpeg', '-y', '-i', filepath, '-ac', '1', '-ar', '16000',
   131→                        '-acodec', 'pcm_s16le', out],
   132→                       capture_output=True, timeout=60)
   133→        if os.path.exists(out) and os.path.getsize(out) > 100:
   134→            return out
   135→    except:
   136→        pass
   137→    return filepath
   138→
   139→
   140→# ===== Java调用入口 =====
   141→def run_compare(audio_path, doc_path, files_dir):
   142→    """被MainActivity.java调用的主入口"""
   143→    # 预处理音频
   144→    cache_dir = os.path.join(files_dir, 'cache')
   145→    os.makedirs(cache_dir, exist_ok=True)
   146→    processed = preprocess_audio(audio_path, cache_dir)
   147→
   148→    # 转录
   149→    model_dir = os.path.join(files_dir, 'models', 'paraformer')
   150→    if os.path.exists(os.path.join(model_dir, 'model.int8.onnx')):
   151→        audio_text = transcribe_sherpa(processed, model_dir)
   152→    else:
   153→        # 回退到百度API
   154→        import requests, base64, json
   155→        resp = requests.post('https://aip.baidubce.com/oauth/2.0/token',
   156→            params={'grant_type':'client_credentials',
   157→                    'client_id':'WRNGMiXLtsPvIAeh9pFhnM2W',
   158→                    'client_secret':'e6nlIRVT25qSuABjRmx21kRoHha2w4t4'}, timeout=10)
   159→        token = resp.json().get('access_token','')
   160→        with open(processed, 'rb') as f:
   161→            data = f.read()
   162→        r = requests.post('https://vop.baidu.com/server_api',
   163→            json={'format':'wav','rate':16000,'channel':1,'cuid':'voicedoc',
   164→                  'token':token,'speech':base64.b64encode(data).decode(),'len':len(data),'dev_pid':1537},
   165→            timeout=60)
   166→        audio_text = ''.join(r.json().get('result', ['转录失败']))
   167→
   168→    # 解析文档
   169→    paragraphs = parse_docx(doc_path)
   170→    doc_text = '\n'.join(paragraphs)
   171→
   172→    # 对比
   173→    summary, diffs = compare_texts(audio_text, doc_text)
   174→
   175→    return {'summary': summary, 'details': '\n'.join(diffs)}
   176→

content.content:
1→"""构建APK的说明和辅助脚本
     2→
     3→构建环境要求（Linux/WSL）：
     4→    sudo apt install python3-pip openjdk-17-jdk autoconf automake libtool
     5→    pip install buildozer cython kivy
     6→
     7→构建步骤：
     8→    1. 在Linux/WSL中进入项目目录
     9→    2. 运行: buildozer android debug
    10→    3. APK输出到: bin/voicedoccompare-1.0.0-arm64-v8a-debug.apk
    11→
    12→也可以用GitHub Actions自动构建（见 .github/workflows/build.yml）
    13→"""
    14→import os
    15→import sys
    16→import subprocess
    17→
    18→
    19→def check_env():
    20→    """检查构建环境"""
    21→    checks = {
    22→        'Python': sys.version,
    23→        'buildozer': None,
    24→        'java': None,
    25→    }
    26→    try:
    27→        r = subprocess.run(['buildozer', '--version'], capture_output=True, text=True)
    28→        checks['buildozer'] = r.stdout.strip() or r.stderr.strip()
    29→    except FileNotFoundError:
    30→        checks['buildozer'] = 'NOT INSTALLED - pip install buildozer'
    31→
    32→    try:
    33→        r = subprocess.run(['java', '-version'], capture_output=True, text=True)
    34→        checks['java'] = r.stderr.strip().split('\n')[0]
    35→    except FileNotFoundError:
    36→        checks['java'] = 'NOT INSTALLED - apt install openjdk-17-jdk'
    37→
    38→    for k, v in checks.items():
    39→        status = 'OK' if v and 'NOT INSTALLED' not in str(v) else 'MISSING'
    40→        print(f'  [{status}] {k}: {v}')
    41→
    42→    return all('NOT INSTALLED' not in str(v) for v in checks.values())
    43→
    44→
    45→def build_debug():
    46→    """构建debug APK"""
    47→    if not check_env():
    48→        print('\n环境检查未通过，请安装缺失的依赖')
    49→        return
    50→    print('\n开始构建APK...')
    51→    subprocess.run(['buildozer', 'android', 'debug'], cwd=os.path.dirname(__file__))
    52→
    53→
    54→if __name__ == '__main__':
    55→    if len(sys.argv) > 1 and sys.argv[1] == 'check':
    56→        check_env()
    57→    else:
    58→        build_debug()
    59→

1→[app]
     2→title = 配音文字核对宝
     3→package.name = voicedoccompare
     4→package.domain = com.voicedoc
     5→source.dir = ./app
     6→source.include_exts = py,png,jpg,kv,atlas,json,onnx,txt
     7→version = 1.0.0
     8→
     9→requirements = python3,kivy,requests,pyjnius,android,pillow,sherpa-onnx
    10→
    11→android.permissions = INTERNET,READ_EXTERNAL_STORAGE,WRITE_EXTERNAL_STORAGE,RECORD_AUDIO
    12→android.api = 33
    13→android.minapi = 24
    14→android.ndk = 25b
    15→android.accept_sdk_license = True
    16→android.arch = arm64-v8a
    17→
    18→# Share Intent: 接收微信分享的音频和文档
    19→android.manifest.intent_filters = intent_filters.xml
    20→
    21→# 全屏
    22→fullscreen = 0
    23→orientation = portrait
    24→
    25→# 图标
    26→# icon.filename = %(source.dir)s/icon.png
    27→
    28→# 日志
    29→log_level = 2

content.content:
1→# 配音文字核对宝 - Android APK版
     2→
     3→## 功能
     4→- 从微信聊天记录直接导入录音和文档（通过分享功能）
     5→- 语音转文字（百度ASR内置/Groq Whisper/OpenAI Whisper）
     6→- 智能文本对比（jieba分词 + 拼音同音字识别 + 数字规范化）
     7→- 差异标注（误读/漏读/多读 + 时间戳定位）
     8→
     9→## 微信导入方式
    10→1. 打开微信聊天窗口
    11→2. 长按录音/文档文件
    12→3. 点击"分享" → 选择"配音文字核对宝"
    13→4. 文件自动导入APP
    14→
    15→## 项目结构
    16→```
    17→app/
    18→  main.py              # Kivy主程序 + UI
    19→  core/
    20→    compare.py         # 核心对比算法
    21→    transcribe.py      # 语音转录（多ASR引擎）
    22→    docx_util.py       # Word文档解析
    23→    wechat_import.py   # 微信Share Intent文件导入
    24→buildozer.spec         # Android构建配置
    25→intent_filters.xml     # Share Intent声明
    26→build_apk.py           # 构建辅助脚本
    27→```
    28→
    29→## 构建APK
    30→
    31→### 方式一：本地构建（需要Linux/WSL）
    32→```bash
    33→pip install buildozer cython kivy
    34→buildozer android debug
    35→```
    36→
    37→### 方式二：GitHub Actions
    38→推送到GitHub后自动构建，在Actions页面下载APK。
    39→
    40→## 核心算法
    41→移植自桌面版 VoiceDocCompare，包含：
    42→- **SequenceMatcher序列比对** - 基于jieba分词的词级差异检测
    43→- **拼音同音字识别** - pypinyin比较，避免同音字误报
    44→- **数字读音规范化** - 阿拉伯数字↔中文数字统一比较
    45→- **填充词过滤** - 自动忽略"嗯""啊"等口语填充词
    46→- **SILK音频解码** - 支持微信.amr/.silk语音格式
    47→

1→"""核心对比算法 - 移植自桌面版 compare.py，适配Android"""
     2→import re
     3→from difflib import SequenceMatcher
     4→from typing import List, Dict, Any
     5→
     6→# 填充词过滤
     7→FILLER_WORDS = {'嗯', '呃', '啊', '哦', '呢', '吧', '嘛', '哈', '噢', '诶',
     8→                '那个', '就是', '就是说', '然后', '对吧', '对的', '这个'}
     9→
    10→CN_NUMBERS_READING = {
    11→    '0': '零', '1': '一', '2': '二', '3': '三', '4': '四',
    12→    '5': '五', '6': '六', '7': '七', '8': '八', '9': '九'
    13→}
    14→
    15→_RE_PUNCT = re.compile(r'[，。！？；：、\u201c\u201d\u2018\u2019（）【】《》…—·\s,.!?;:\'"()\[\]{}\-]')
    16→
    17→
    18→def _normalize(text):
    19→    return _RE_PUNCT.sub('', text)
    20→
    21→
    22→def _is_punct(ch):
    23→    return bool(_RE_PUNCT.match(ch))
    24→
    25→
    26→def _segment(text):
    27→    """分词：优先用jieba，不可用时按字切分"""
    28→    try:
    29→        import jieba
    30→        return [w for w in jieba.cut(text) if w.strip()]
    31→    except ImportError:
    32→        # Android上jieba可能不可用，按字切分
    33→        return [c for c in text if c.strip()]
    34→
    35→
    36→def _same_pinyin(a, b):
    37→    """拼音比较：优先用pypinyin，不可用时直接字符比较"""
    38→    if not a or not b:
    39→        return False
    40→    a_clean = _normalize(a)
    41→    b_clean = _normalize(b)
    42→    if not a_clean or not b_clean:
    43→        return False
    44→    if a_clean == b_clean:
    45→        return True
    46→    try:
    47→        from pypinyin import pinyin, Style
    48→        pa = pinyin(a_clean, style=Style.TONE3, neutral_tone_with_five=True)
    49→        pb = pinyin(b_clean, style=Style.TONE3, neutral_tone_with_five=True)
    50→        return pa == pb
    51→    except ImportError:
    52→        return False
    53→
    54→
    55→def _arabic_to_chinese(num_str, is_year=False):
    56→    if not num_str or not num_str.isdigit():
    57→        return num_str
    58→    if is_year:
    59→        return ''.join(CN_NUMBERS_READING.get(d, d) for d in num_str)
    60→    try:
    61→        num = int(num_str)
    62→        if num < 10:
    63→            return CN_NUMBERS_READING[num_str]
    64→        elif num < 20:
    65→            return '十' + (CN_NUMBERS_READING[num_str[1]] if num_str[1] != '0' else '')
    66→        elif num < 100:
    67→            t, o = num // 10, num % 10
    68→            r = CN_NUMBERS_READING[str(t)] + '十'
    69→            if o > 0:
    70→                r += CN_NUMBERS_READING[str(o)]
    71→            return r
    72→        else:
    73→            return ''.join(CN_NUMBERS_READING.get(d, d) for d in num_str)
    74→    except:
    75→        return num_str
    76→
    77→
    78→def _normalize_number_reading(text):
    79→    result = re.sub(r'(\d{4})年', lambda m: ''.join(CN_NUMBERS_READING.get(d, d) for d in m.group(1)) + '年', text)
    80→    result = re.sub(r'(\d+)%', lambda m: '百分之' + _arabic_to_chinese(m.group(1)), result)
    81→    result = re.sub(r'(\d+)', lambda m: _arabic_to_chinese(m.group(1)), result)
    82→    return re.sub(r'\s+', '', result)
    83→
    84→
    85→def _find_paragraph(doc_paragraphs, word_pos, doc_words):
    86→    char_offset = sum(len(w) for w in doc_words[:word_pos])
    87→    running = 0
    88→    for idx, p in enumerate(doc_paragraphs):
    89→        plen = len(_normalize(p))
    90→        if running + plen > char_offset:
    91→            return idx
    92→        running += plen
    93→    return len(doc_paragraphs) - 1
    94→
    95→
    96→def compare_texts(audio_text, doc_text, word_timestamps=None, confidence_threshold=0.0):
    97→    """核心对比算法：jieba分词 + SequenceMatcher + 拼音同音字识别"""
    98→    doc_paragraphs = [p.strip() for p in doc_text.split('\n') if p.strip()]
    99→
   100→    audio_norm = _normalize(audio_text)

1→"""语音转录模块 - Android版，使用云端ASR API"""
     2→import os, json, base64, tempfile, subprocess
     3→import requests
     4→from typing import Optional, Callable
     5→
     6→
     7→def _convert_silk_to_wav(silk_path, output_path=None):
     8→    """将微信SILK/AMR格式音频转为WAV
     9→    微信语音消息格式：.amr 或 .silk（实际是silk v3编码）
    10→    """
    11→    if output_path is None:
    12→        output_path = silk_path.rsplit('.', 1)[0] + '.wav'
    13→
    14→    # 尝试用ffmpeg转换（支持amr和大部分格式）
    15→    try:
    16→        subprocess.run([
    17→            'ffmpeg', '-y', '-i', silk_path,
    18→            '-ac', '1', '-ar', '16000', '-acodec', 'pcm_s16le',
    19→            output_path
    20→        ], capture_output=True, timeout=30)
    21→        if os.path.exists(output_path) and os.path.getsize(output_path) > 100:
    22→            return output_path
    23→    except:
    24→        pass
    25→
    26→    # 尝试用silk-decoder（针对silk v3格式）
    27→    try:
    28→        subprocess.run(['silk_decoder', silk_path, output_path.replace('.wav', '.pcm')],
    29→                       capture_output=True, timeout=10)
    30→        pcm_path = output_path.replace('.wav', '.pcm')
    31→        if os.path.exists(pcm_path):
    32→            subprocess.run([
    33→                'ffmpeg', '-y', '-f', 's16le', '-ar', '24000', '-ac', '1',
    34→                '-i', pcm_path, output_path
    35→            ], capture_output=True, timeout=10)
    36→            os.remove(pcm_path)
    37→            if os.path.exists(output_path):
    38→                return output_path
    39→    except:
    40→        pass
    41→
    42→    return silk_path  # 返回原文件，让ASR尝试处理
    43→
    44→
    45→def preprocess_audio(filepath, progress_cb=None):
    46→    """音频预处理：格式转换 + 重采样"""
    47→    ext = os.path.splitext(filepath)[1].lower()
    48→
    49→    # 微信语音格式需要特殊处理
    50→    if ext in ('.silk', '.amr', '.slk'):
    51→        if progress_cb:
    52→            progress_cb('正在转换微信语音格式...')
    53→        wav_path = filepath.rsplit('.', 1)[0] + '_converted.wav'
    54→        return _convert_silk_to_wav(filepath, wav_path)
    55→
    56→    # 其他格式用ffmpeg统一转为16kHz WAV
    57→    if progress_cb:
    58→        progress_cb('正在预处理音频...')
    59→    out = filepath.rsplit('.', 1)[0] + '_preprocessed.wav'
    60→    try:
    61→        subprocess.run([
    62→            'ffmpeg', '-y', '-i', filepath,
    63→            '-ac', '1', '-ar', '16000', '-acodec', 'pcm_s16le', out
    64→        ], capture_output=True, timeout=60)
    65→        if os.path.exists(out) and os.path.getsize(out) > 100:
    66→            return out
    67→    except:
    68→        pass
    69→    return filepath
    70→
    71→
    72→def transcribe_baidu(filepath, api_key, secret_key, app_id='', progress_cb=None):
    73→    """百度语音识别API"""
    74→    if progress_cb:
    75→        progress_cb('正在获取百度Token...')
    76→
    77→    # 获取token
    78→    resp = requests.post('https://aip.baidubce.com/oauth/2.0/token',
    79→        params={'grant_type': 'client_credentials', 'client_id': api_key, 'client_secret': secret_key}, timeout=10)
    80→    token = resp.json().get('access_token')
    81→    if not token:
    82→        raise Exception('百度Token获取失败')
    83→
    84→    # 读取音频
    85→    with open(filepath, 'rb') as f:
    86→        audio_data = f.read()
    87→
    88→    if len(audio_data) > 2 * 1024 * 1024:
    89→        # 长音频分段处理
    90→        return _transcribe_baidu_chunked(filepath, token, app_id, progress_cb)
    91→
    92→    if progress_cb:
    93→        progress_cb('正在识别语音...')
    94→
    95→    payload = {
    96→        'format': 'wav', 'rate': 16000, 'channel': 1,
    97→        'cuid': app_id or 'voice_doc_compare_apk',
    98→        'token': token,
    99→        'speech': base64.b64encode(audio_data).decode(),
   100→        'len': len(audio_data),

### 2. GRADLE BUILD CONFIGURATION

#### Root Level (`/d/VoiceDocCompare/`)

**File: `build.gradle`**
- Uses Android Gradle Plugin 8.2.0
- Chaquopy Python plugin 15.0.1
- Repositories: google(), mavenCentral()

**File: `settings.gradle`**
```gradle
pluginManagement {
    repositories { google(), mavenCentral(), gradlePluginPortal() }
}
dependencyResolutionManagement {
    repositoriesMode.set(RepositoriesMode.FAIL_ON_PROJECT_REPOS)
    repositories { google(), mavenCentral() }
}
rootProject.name = "VoiceDocCompare"
include ':app'
```

**File: `gradle.properties`**
- `android.useAndroidX=true`
- `org.gradle.jvmargs=-Xmx2048m`

**File: `local.properties`**

**Gradle Wrapper**
- Version: **8.2** (gradle-8.2-bin.zip)

- Executable: `gradlew` and `gradlew.bat`

---

### 3. PRIMARY APP MODULE (`/d/VoiceDocCompare/app/build.gradle`)

**Critical Configuration:**

```gradle
plugins {
    id 'com.android.application'
    id 'com.chaquo.python'
}

android {
    namespace 'com.voicedoc.app'
    compileSdk 34
    
    defaultConfig {
        applicationId "com.voicedoc.app"
        minSdk 24
        targetSdk 34
        versionCode 2
        versionName "2.0.0"
        
        python {
            version "3.8"
            buildPython "C:/Users/Administrator/funasr-venv/Scripts/python.exe"
            pip {
                install "requests"
            }
        }
        
        ndk {
            abiFilters "arm64-v8a"
        }
    }
    
    buildTypes {
        release {
            minifyEnabled false
        }
    }
    
    sourceSets {
        main {
            python.srcDirs = ["src/main/python"]
        }
    }
}

dependencies {
    implementation 'androidx.appcompat:appcompat:1.6.1'
    implementation 'com.google.android.material:material:1.11.0'
    implementation 'androidx.constraintlayout:constraintlayout:2.1.4'
    implementation files('libs/sherpa-onnx-1.12.25.aar')
    implementation 'org.jetbrains.kotlin:kotlin-stdlib:1.9.22'
}
```

**Key Points:**
- **Python Version**: 3.8 (set in defaultConfig)
- **Custom Build Python**: `C:/Users/Administrator/funasr-venv/Scripts/python.exe`
- **ABI Filters**: Only arm64-v8a (arm64)
- **NDK**: Required for native libraries
- **AAR Library**: sherpa-onnx-1.12.25.aar (39.8 MB)


**Functionality:**
- Handles file picking for audio and documents
- Processes WeChat intent filters for file sharing
- Manages UI with ProgressBar and ScrollView
- Calls Python engine module via Chaquopy

**Intent Filters:**
- Receives audio files (`audio/*`)
- Receives DOCX documents
- Receives Word documents (both .doc and .docx formats)
- Receives plain text files
- Supports multiple file sharing

#### Layouts
- **activity_main.xml**: Material Design UI with buttons, TextViews, ProgressBar, ScrollView
- **themes.xml**: Material Components Light theme with primary color #2196F3

---

### 5. PYTHON ENGINE & MODULES

#### Python Entry Point (`/d/VoiceDocCompare/app/src/main/python/engine.py`)

This file is **called by MainActivity.java** through Chaquopy:

```python
def run_compare(audio_path, doc_path, files_dir):
    """被MainActivity.java调用的主入口"""
    # 预处理音频
    cache_dir = os.path.join(files_dir, 'cache')
    os.makedirs(cache_dir, exist_ok=True)
    processed = preprocess_audio(audio_path, cache_dir)
    
    # 转录
    model_dir = os.path.join(files_dir, 'models', 'paraformer')
    if os.path.exists(os.path.join(model_dir, 'model.int8.onnx')):
        audio_text = transcribe_sherpa(processed, model_dir)
    else:
        # 回退到百度API
        audio_text = transcribe_baidu(...)
    
    # 解析文档
    paragraphs = parse_docx(doc_path)
    doc_text = '\n'.join(paragraphs)
    
    # 对比
    summary, diffs = compare_texts(audio_text, doc_text)
    return {'summary': summary, 'details': '\n'.join(diffs)}
```

**Features:**
- Audio preprocessing with ffmpeg
- Speech-to-text with sherpa-onnx (offline) or Baidu API (fallback)
- DOCX/TXT document parsing
- Text comparison with diff detection

#### Core Modules (`/d/VoiceDocCompare/app/core/`)
1. **compare.py**: Sequence matching, pinyin normalization, character-level diffing
2. **transcribe.py**: Audio format conversion (SILK/AMR), ASR provider integration (Baidu, Groq, OpenAI)
3. **config.py**: Service provider definitions (8+ LLM providers, 5+ ASR providers)
4. **docx_util.py**: Word document parsing (zipfile + XML)
5. **model_download.py**: Paraformer model management
6. **wechat_import.py**: WeChat file sharing handler

**AAR File Location:** `/d/VoiceDocCompare/app/libs/sherpa-onnx-1.12.25.aar` (39.8 MB)

**Integration Method:**
- Added to dependencies: `implementation files('libs/sherpa-onnx-1.12.25.aar')`
- Extracted by Chaquopy via `chaquopy { extractPackages = ["sherpa_onnx"] }` in original Android build.gradle

**Models:**

- Files:

  - `tokens.txt` (vocabulary)
- Also bundled in assets: `/d/VoiceDocCompare/app/src/main/assets/models/paraformer/`

content.content:
1→"""Android端Python引擎 - 多ASR引擎 + 文本对比
     2→   ASR引擎：Sherpa-ONNX(Java侧) / 百度(内置) / Groq Whisper / OpenAI Whisper / FunASR(局域网)
     3→"""
     4→import os, re, json, base64
     5→from difflib import SequenceMatcher
     6→try:
     7→    import requests
     8→except ImportError:
     9→    requests = None
    10→
    11→
    12→# ===== 文档解析 =====
    13→def parse_docx(filepath):
    14→    ext = os.path.splitext(filepath)[1].lower()
    15→    if ext == '.txt':
    16→        with open(filepath, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
    17→            return [l.strip() for l in f if l.strip()]
    18→    import zipfile
    19→    from xml.etree import ElementTree
    20→    ns = '{http://schemas.openxmlformats.org/wordprocessingml/2006/main}'
    21→    paragraphs = []
    22→    with zipfile.ZipFile(filepath) as z:
    23→        with z.open('word/document.xml') as f:
    24→            tree = ElementTree.parse(f)
    25→    for p in tree.iter(f'{ns}p'):
    26→        texts = [t.text for t in p.iter(f'{ns}t') if t.text]
    27→        line = ''.join(texts).strip()
    28→        if line:
    29→            paragraphs.append(line)
    30→    return paragraphs
    31→
    32→
    33→# ===== 文本规范化 =====
    34→_RE_PUNCT = re.compile(r'[，。！？；：、\u201c\u201d\u2018\u2019（）【】《》…—·\s,.!?;:\'\"()\[\]{}\-]')
    35→FILLER_WORDS = {'嗯', '呃', '啊', '哦', '呢', '吧', '嘛', '哈', '噢', '诶', '那个', '就是', '然后'}
    36→CN_NUM = {'0':'零','1':'一','2':'二','3':'三','4':'四','5':'五','6':'六','7':'七','8':'八','9':'九'}
    37→
    38→def _norm(text):
    39→    return _RE_PUNCT.sub('', text)
    40→
    41→def _segment(text):
    42→    return [c for c in text if c.strip()]
    43→
    44→def _num_reading(text):
    45→    result = re.sub(r'(\d{4})年', lambda m: ''.join(CN_NUM.get(d,d) for d in m.group(1))+'年', text)
    46→    result = re.sub(r'(\d+)%', lambda m: '百分之'+''.join(CN_NUM.get(d,d) for d in m.group(1)), result)
    47→    return re.sub(r'(\d+)', lambda m: ''.join(CN_NUM.get(d,d) for d in m.group(1)), result)
    48→
    49→def _same_pinyin(a, b):
    50→    a_c, b_c = _norm(a), _norm(b)
    51→    if not a_c or not b_c:
    52→        return False
    53→    if a_c == b_c:
    54→        return True
    55→    return _num_reading(a_c) == _num_reading(b_c)
    56→
    57→
    58→# ===== 对比算法 =====
    59→def compare_texts(audio_text, doc_text):
    60→    audio_norm = _norm(audio_text)
    61→    doc_norm = _norm(doc_text)
    62→    audio_words = _segment(audio_norm)
    63→    doc_words = _segment(doc_norm)
    64→
    65→    matcher = SequenceMatcher(None, doc_words, audio_words)
    66→    diffs = []
    67→
    68→    for tag, i1, i2, j1, j2 in matcher.get_opcodes():
    69→        if tag == 'equal':
    70→            continue
    71→        doc_frag = ''.join(doc_words[i1:i2])
    72→        audio_frag = ''.join(audio_words[j1:j2])
    73→
    74→        if tag == 'insert' and audio_frag in FILLER_WORDS:
    75→            continue
    76→        if tag == 'delete' and doc_frag in FILLER_WORDS:
    77→            continue
    78→        if tag == 'replace' and _same_pinyin(doc_frag, audio_frag):
    79→            continue
    80→        if not doc_frag.strip() and not audio_frag.strip():
    81→            continue
    82→
    83→        dtype = '误读' if tag == 'replace' else ('漏读' if tag == 'delete' else '多读')
    84→        if tag == 'replace':
    85→            diffs.append('[%s] 原文: %s → 录音: %s' % (dtype, doc_frag, audio_frag))
    86→        elif tag == 'delete':
    87→            diffs.append('[%s] %s' % (dtype, doc_frag))
    88→        else:
    89→            diffs.append('[%s] %s' % (dtype, audio_frag))
    90→
    91→    n_mis = sum(1 for d in diffs if d.startswith('[误读'))
    92→    n_miss = sum(1 for d in diffs if d.startswith('[漏读'))
    93→    n_extra = sum(1 for d in diffs if d.startswith('[多读'))
    94→    total = max(len(doc_norm), 1)
    95→    accuracy = max(0, (1 - len(diffs) * 3 / total) * 100)
    96→
    97→    summary = '共%d处差异：%d处误读，%d处漏读，%d处多读\n准确率约 %.1f%%' % (len(diffs), n_mis, n_miss, n_extra, accuracy)
    98→    return summary, diffs
    99→
   100→
   101→# ===== 百度语音识别（内置密钥） =====
   102→BAIDU_KEY = 'WRNGMiXLtsPvIAeh9pFhnM2W'
   103→BAIDU_SECRET = 'e6nlIRVT25qSuABjRmx21kRoHha2w4t4'
   104→
   105→def transcribe_baidu(filepath):
   106→    """百度语音识别"""
   107→    resp = requests.post('https://aip.baidubce.com/oauth/2.0/token',
   108→        params={'grant_type': 'client_credentials',
   109→                'client_id': BAIDU_KEY, 'client_secret': BAIDU_SECRET}, timeout=10)
   110→    token = resp.json().get('access_token', '')
   111→    if not token:
   112→        raise Exception('百度Token获取失败')
   113→
   114→    with open(filepath, 'rb') as f:
   115→        audio_data = f.read()
   116→
   117→    result = requests.post('https://vop.baidu.com/server_api', json={
   118→        'format': 'wav', 'rate': 16000, 'channel': 1,
   119→        'cuid': 'voicedoc_apk', 'token': token,
   120→        'speech': base64.b64encode(audio_data).decode(),
   121→        'len': len(audio_data), 'dev_pid': 1537
   122→    }, timeout=60).json()
   123→
   124→    if result.get('err_no', -1) == 0:
   125→        return ''.join(result.get('result', []))
   126→    raise Exception('百度识别失败: %s' % result.get('err_msg', '未知错误'))
   127→
   128→
   129→# ===== Groq Whisper =====
   130→GROQ_KEY = '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'
   131→
   132→def transcribe_groq(filepath):
   133→    """Groq Whisper API"""
   134→    with open(filepath, 'rb') as f:
   135→        resp = requests.post('https://api.groq.com/openai/v1/audio/transcriptions',
   136→            headers={'Authorization': 'Bearer %s' % GROQ_KEY},
   137→            files={'file': (os.path.basename(filepath), f, 'audio/wav')},
   138→            data={'model': 'whisper-large-v3', 'language': 'zh',
   139→                  'response_format': 'verbose_json',
   140→                  'timestamp_granularities': ['word']},
   141→            timeout=180)
   142→    data = resp.json()
   143→    if 'text' not in data:
   144→        raise Exception('Groq识别失败: %s' % json.dumps(data, ensure_ascii=False)[:200])
   145→    return data['text']
   146→
   147→
   148→# ===== FunASR 局域网 =====
   149→def transcribe_funasr(filepath, server_url):
   150→    """FunASR局域网服务"""
   151→    try:
   152→        r = requests.get('%s/health' % server_url, timeout=3)
   153→        if r.status_code != 200:
   154→            raise Exception('FunASR服务未响应')
   155→    except requests.exceptions.ConnectionError:
   156→        raise Exception('无法连接FunASR服务(%s)\n请确认手机和电脑在同一WiFi' % server_url)
   157→
   158→    with open(filepath, 'rb') as f:
   159→        resp = requests.post('%s/transcribe_file' % server_url,
   160→            files={'file': (os.path.basename(filepath), f)}, timeout=600)
   161→
   162→    if resp.status_code == 404:
   163→        resp = requests.post('%s/transcribe' % server_url,
   164→            json={'file_path': os.path.abspath(filepath)}, timeout=600)
   165→
   166→    data = resp.json()
   167→    if not data.get('success'):
   168→        raise Exception(data.get('error', 'FunASR转写失败'))
   169→    return data.get('text', '')
   170→
   171→
   172→# ===== OpenAI Whisper =====
   173→def transcribe_openai(filepath, api_key):
   174→    """OpenAI Whisper API"""
   175→    with open(filepath, 'rb') as f:
   176→        resp = requests.post('https://api.openai.com/v1/audio/transcriptions',
   177→            headers={'Authorization': 'Bearer %s' % api_key},
   178→            files={'file': (os.path.basename(filepath), f, 'audio/wav')},
   179→            data={'model': 'whisper-1', 'response_format': 'verbose_json',
   180→                  'timestamp_granularities': ['word']},
   181→            timeout=120)
   182→    data = resp.json()
   183→    return data.get('text', '')
   184→
   185→
   186→# ===== 统一转录入口（Python侧，非Sherpa） =====
   187→def transcribe(filepath, provider, extra_arg=''):
   188→    """Python端ASR转录（百度/Groq/FunASR/OpenAI）"""
   189→    if provider == 'baidu_builtin':
   190→        return transcribe_baidu(filepath)
   191→    elif provider == 'groq_whisper':
   192→        return transcribe_groq(filepath)
   193→    elif provider == 'funasr':
   194→        return transcribe_funasr(filepath, extra_arg or 'http://192.168.1.100:8765')
   195→    elif provider == 'openai_whisper':
   196→        return transcribe_openai(filepath, extra_arg)
   197→    else:
   198→        raise Exception('不支持的ASR引擎: %s' % provider)
   199→
   200→
   201→# ===== 测试ASR连通性 =====
   202→def test_asr(provider, extra_arg=''):
   203→    """测试ASR引擎连通性"""
   204→    try:
   205→        if provider == 'baidu_builtin':
   206→            resp = requests.post('https://aip.baidubce.com/oauth/2.0/token',
   207→                params={'grant_type': 'client_credentials',
   208→                        'client_id': BAIDU_KEY, 'client_secret': BAIDU_SECRET}, timeout=5)
   209→            token = resp.json().get('access_token', '')
   210→            if token:
   211→                return '百度语音: 连接成功，Token已获取'
   212→            return '百度语音: Token获取失败'
   213→
   214→        elif provider == 'groq_whisper':
   215→            resp = requests.get('https://api.groq.com/openai/v1/models',
   216→                headers={'Authorization': 'Bearer %s' % GROQ_KEY}, timeout=5)
   217→            if resp.status_code == 200:
   218→                return 'Groq Whisper: 连接成功，API Key有效'
   219→            return 'Groq Whisper: API Key无效 (HTTP %d)' % resp.status_code
   220→
   221→        elif provider == 'funasr':
   222→            url = extra_arg or 'http://192.168.1.100:8765'
   223→            resp = requests.get('%s/health' % url, timeout=3)
   224→            if resp.status_code == 200:
   225→                return 'FunASR: 服务连接成功'
   226→            return 'FunASR: 服务未响应'
   227→
   228→        elif provider == 'openai_whisper':
   229→            resp = requests.get('https://api.openai.com/v1/models',
   230→                headers={'Authorization': 'Bearer %s' % extra_arg}, timeout=5)
   231→            if resp.status_code == 200:
   232→                return 'OpenAI Whisper: 连接成功'
   233→            return 'OpenAI Whisper: API Key无效'
   234→
   235→        elif provider == 'sherpa_offline':
   236→            return 'Sherpa-ONNX: 离线模型，无需网络连接'
   237→        else:
   238→            return '未知引擎: %s' % provider
   239→    except Exception as e:
   240→        return '测试失败: %s' % str(e)
   241→
   242→
   243→# ===== Java调用入口 =====
   244→def run_compare(audio_text, doc_path):
   245→    """主入口：接收ASR文本，进行文本对比"""
   246→    paragraphs = parse_docx(doc_path)

content.thinking:
Now I understand the full picture:

1. The project uses **Gradle + Chaquopy + sherpa-onnx AAR** for building the APK
2. **MainActivity.java** handles the Android UI and uses sherpa-onnx Java API directly for speech recognition
3. **engine.py** is called via Chaquopy for text comparison and other Python-side ASR (Baidu, Groq, FunASR, OpenAI)
4. The sherpa-onnx integration is via Java (not Python) - `import com.k2fsa.sherpa.onnx.*`


5. Models are loaded from Android Assets with paths like `models/paraformer/model.int8.onnx`

I'm noticing that the Java code references `testModel()` and `tvModelStatus` UI elements, but I need to find where these methods are actually implemented since they're being called but not visible in the current code snippet.

Looking at `startCompare()`, it's directly invoking `transcribeSherpa()` without checking which ASR provider is selected, which means the UI is missing the provider selection and settings functionality that exists in the Kivy version.

The user wants to download and integrate Sherpa-ONNX to build the APK. The AAR library is already in place at 39.8MB, and the models are present, so I need to focus on fixing missing methods in MainActivity, ensuring the model files are accessible through AssetManager in the assets directory, configuring the build environment, and running the Gradle build.

Looking at the code, the AssetManager constructor requires model files to be in `app/src/main/assets/models/paraformer/`, and from the exploration output, these files appear to already be bundled there. I should verify they're in the right location, check that the layout XML widget IDs match the Java code, then proceed with setting ANDROID_HOME and running the debug build with gradlew.bat, keeping in mind the 233MB model will make the APK quite large. Now I need to finalize the build configuration and then compile everything. Let me also check what's currently in the assets directory and review the layout XML to make sure everything's properly set up.

file.content:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?>
<manifest xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android">

    <uses-permission android:name="android.permission.INTERNET" />
    <uses-permission android:name="android.permission.READ_EXTERNAL_STORAGE" />
    <uses-permission android:name="android.permission.WRITE_EXTERNAL_STORAGE" />
    <uses-permission android:name="android.permission.READ_MEDIA_AUDIO" />

    <application
        android:allowBackup="true"
        android:label="配音文字核对宝"
        android:supportsRtl="true"
        android:theme="@style/Theme.VoiceDocCompare">

        <activity
            android:name=".MainActivity"
            android:exported="true">
            <intent-filter>
                <action android:name="android.intent.action.MAIN" />
                <category android:name="android.intent.category.LAUNCHER" />
            </intent-filter>

            <!-- 接收微信分享的音频文件 -->
            <intent-filter>
                <action android:name="android.intent.action.SEND" />
                <category android:name="android.intent.category.DEFAULT" />
                <data android:mimeType="audio/*" />
            </intent-filter>

            <!-- 接收微信分享的文档文件 -->
            <intent-filter>
                <action android:name="android.intent.action.SEND" />
                <category android:name="android.intent.category.DEFAULT" />
                <data android:mimeType="application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.wordprocessingml.document" />
            </intent-filter>
            <intent-filter>
                <action android:name="android.intent.action.SEND" />
                <category android:name="android.intent.category.DEFAULT" />
                <data android:mimeType="application/msword" />
            </intent-filter>
            <intent-filter>
                <action android:name="android.intent.action.SEND" />
                <category android:name="android.intent.category.DEFAULT" />
                <data android:mimeType="text/plain" />
            </intent-filter>

            <!-- 接收多文件分享 -->
            <intent-filter>
                <action android:name="android.intent.action.SEND_MULTIPLE" />
                <category android:name="android.intent.category.DEFAULT" />
                <data android:mimeType="*/*" />
            </intent-filter>
        </activity>
    </application>
</manifest>
